name: Developing Report (via VPP)
subject: Joe Biden’s incredible call to loyal Democrats >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Join our petition to Congress!
| **_BREAKING FROM NPR: Biden backs filibuster carveout for abortion rights_** | **|| URGENT PETITION TO CONGRESS ||**
[**We need 15,000 Democratic signatures to help President Biden and pressure the Senate to ABOLISH the filibuster and codify Roe!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230204_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=6249%2E878179%2EVGEOB-) | [**SIGN OUR PETITION TO ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER AND PROTECT ABORTION RIGHTS** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230204_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=6249%2E878179%2EVGEOB-)
---
_We’re thrilled:_ President Biden COMMANDED Senate Democrats to do their job and change the filibuster rules to codify _Roe v. Wade._

[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230204_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=6249%2E878179%2EVGEOB-)
Mitch McConnell and Trump’s Justices are panicking, and they’re sprinting to pressure Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema to keep the filibuster in place...
That’s why we’re racing to get 15,000 Democratic signatures by midnight tonight. If we fall short, the GOP will totally drown out President Biden – _we can’t let that happen!_

[**Quick: add your name to our petition demanding the Senate abolish the filibuster and codify Roe!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230204_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=6249%2E878179%2EVGEOB-)
[**SIGN OUR PETITION TO ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER AND PROTECT ABORTION RIGHTS** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230204_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=6249%2E878179%2EVGEOB-)
---
Thank you,

_Team VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6249%2E878179%2EVGEOB-). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6249%2E878179%2EVGEOB-).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6249%2E878179%2EVGEOB-) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=6249%2E878179%2EVGEOB-). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6249%2E878179%2EVGEOB-)
---

In three short days, President Biden will deliver the annual State of the Union address. In just two years, President Biden has added a record number of jobs, expanded health care to millions of Americans, and passed major gun safety legislation. **But state Democrats are at the heart of the Biden-Harris agenda – they’re critical to passing progressive legislation to protect abortion access, improve infrastructure, and so much more.** So ahead of the speech, we’re surveying grassroots Democrats across the country for their opinions on the Biden-Harris agenda. name: Rick Scott
subject: Will you join my mission to rescue America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Woke indoctrination in our schools. Trillions of dollars in debt. Wide open borders.

Right now, politicians in Washington are leaving a mess for the next generation and putting our prosperity - and existence as the world’s superpower - in danger. And I am fighting back.
For too long, Republicans in Washington have looked the other way while Democrats have made a mockery of our great country.
It’s time for a new era of conservatism, Peter. And, I need your help to **RESCUE AMERICA.**

| | NEGOP Legislative Update for Week Ending February 4, 2023 Another positive week at the Unicameral for Republicans. The biggest change in 2023 is that people are showing up! Constitutional Carry had a large audience, the Parents’ Bill of Rights exceeded that large crowd, and then the combination of Voter ID and the Heartbeat Bill testifiers took the cake for the biggest crowd of the year. People are traveling to make sure they are on record for supporting common-sense bills at this critical hour. Numbers continue to be important. The lobbies and paid institutional voices have always been there, but the Senators are seeing the large numbers of unpaid, everyday people who are being affected by the current environment. The concern on these issues to everyday people is finally hurting at a level where they are deciding to do something about it. Your stories reinforce why Parents’ Rights, Voter ID, Babies, and laws matter! The Salvation of the State is The Watchfulness of the Citizen. The watchfulness is back. Special thanks to the County Party leaders and outside organizations for their efforts to drive attendance!
We have updated the hearing times as of 3:00 Saturday around our key bills (below). These bills are at the bottom of the letter. We added a few bills to our support list after consultation with our Public Safety committee. We highlighted the times for this week (Note: Committee hearing times can change. Please double-check before driving to Lincoln). Furthermore, we heard a few need assistance in how best to submit their testimony online if they cannot make it to Lincoln. Video Tutorial: [https://youtu.be/ee2CDnZwdqE](https://www.ne.gop/so/99OOQ7-8T/c?w=gTxW87Gsq2GU8pj0SrleBWSHsvuV23girTLy0EhFysM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9lZTJDRG5ad2RxRSIsInIiOiJhNmViODU0Ny04NzZiLTQ1ZWItYzU1OC03M2ViMDg2ZGM5ZWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0MThjMTc2MS1lZGQzLTRjMWEtYjA2NC1jMGJhYzlkMDI2NGYifQ) William Feely, Committeeman and Legislative Director Written Tutorial: [https://forwardnebraska.substack.com/p/how-to-comment-on-your-bills?r=rb3iq&utm_medium=ios&utm_campaign=post](https://www.ne.gop/so/99OOQ7-8T/c?w=6G4hrGqjGETfjhIpK09c00b6yzI04xeIo4k2Iwo2RtI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3J3YXJkbmVicmFza2Euc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL3AvaG93LXRvLWNvbW1lbnQtb24teW91ci1iaWxscz9yPXJiM2lxJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09aW9zJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1wb3N0IiwiciI6ImE2ZWI4NTQ3LTg3NmItNDVlYi1jNTU4LTczZWIwODZkYzllYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQxOGMxNzYxLWVkZDMtNGMxYS1iMDY0LWMwYmFjOWQwMjY0ZiJ9) Sue Greenwald, Committeewoman In the meantime, here is a broad brush summary of the week on key issues. Taxes No major hiccups in the plans from prior weeks. Hearings continue to move forward around significant and needed tax law changes across the state. This week’s hearings were held to limit annual increases in school districts (Caps can still be violated with a large majority of the board or people) as part of a broader plan to control property taxes. The party is strongly supporting the Constitutional Amendment presented by Senator Riepe to eliminate the Inheritance Tax. The Inheritance Tax exists in six states in the Union. We believe it should be zero and that reducing that number to five will be a good start. County Commissioners are usually the most opposed because it affects their revenue they spend. Please be in consultation with your County Commissioners to understand if they support or oppose this bill. This is yet one more tax that makes our state uncompetitive with peers. We need changes. Economy Testimony was heard for a different minimum wage for minors. This would allow a lower wage that would encourage employers to hire younger individuals who need on the job training (aka “Training Wage”) to begin their career. It would also ease the cost burden on employers who take on those new to the workforce needing their skills developed. The banking and finance committee began to discuss keeping funds out of the hands of banks with political policies as a key determinant to their business behavior. These political policies often take positions against key Nebraska economic interests like cattle, coal power, and more. Safeguarding our Treasury funds is already being done by our Treasurer. However, safeguards are being sought for the position in the future should a change in attitude occur in that role. Our current concern at the party is the amount of funds with the Nebraska Investment Council that are invested with firms that have ESG policies. It is important to note that most states have their Treasurer steward both banking and investment funds of the states. In Nebraska, the investment funds are not the responsibility of the Treasurer. Those funds are the responsibility of the Investment Council whose members are appointed by the Governor. The Council usually meets on the 9th of every month at various locations around the state. We encourage you to attend and encourage a shift away from firms with policies that work against industries that are critical to the general welfare of Nebraska.
Education Parents showed up in force to testify for the Parents’ Bill of Rights. An overflow room was created for attendees as the actual hearing room was insufficient to seat everyone. We thank our Senators for spending hours into the evening (a common practice this week...please give coffee where you can) to listen to testimony. In addition, testimony was heard on a grant to recruit more teachers addressing the workforce problems. Discussions on how to address the teacher shortage were productive and an interchange of ideas was had. It should be noted that citations of teachers leaving due to teaching issues of conscience were made in hearings around Parental rights that do not fit the narrative those on the other side want to formally recognize. As a party we will continue to express the frustrations of what school bodies are forcing teachers to teach. Election Integrity Voter Identification hearings began this week. There were significant adjustments that were made this week to Senator Slama’s ID bill the day before the hearing. Senator Erdman has his own version of Voter ID between the two bills being debated. We are anticipating the inevitable blending of the two bills into one. This legislation is not optionable for the Legislature due to the Constitutional amendment. Those testifying against Voter ID do not realize how this is not an optionable choice for the legislature. Two bills submitted by the Secretary State via State Senators were also presented for consideration. Legislation on this issue is being crafted real time. We encourage you to be engaged in this process as these clauses will affect the future of our elections for many years to come. There are numerous additional bills on Voter ID coming to the floor. Public Service Commission Christian Mirch was appointed to the Public Service Commission by the Governor. Christian Mirch is a tremendous asset to the party. His experience as an attorney, cop, and a ranch hand is an incredible experience set to help this state. His legal knowledge will be a tremendous asset to serving our state. Below is our list of supported bills. We are grateful for our Republican Senators working hard to see Constitutional and conservative values through. Please pray, encourage, and continue to attend these important meetings to improve our State.
Todd WatsonNEGOP Political Director

clean_body: For Your Situational Awareness Highlighted BILLS this NEXT WEEK : Government, Military and Veterans Affairs Committee February 8th LB143 Bri | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | 108th Legislative Session"2ND HOUSE ALERT/WEEKLY UPDATE"February 4, 2023 | | | | | | | For Your Situational Awareness Highlighted BILLS this NEXT WEEK :Government, Military and Veterans Affairs Committee February 8th for year-round daylight saving time Location: Room 1507 Time: 9:30 AM 8th amendment to provide for recall of the Governor, Lieutenant Governor, Secretary of State, State Treasurer, Attorney General, or Auditor of Public Accounts or a member of the Legislature Health and Human Services Committee February 8th the Let Them Grow ActLocation: Room 1510 Time: 1:30 Pm *Election Integrity/ Voter ID hearings begin Feb 1st NOW IS THE TIME TO FILL THE SEATS OF THE "2ND HOUSE"! | | Get Our Second House Alerts | | | | | | | NEGOP Legislative Update for Week Ending February 4, 2023 Another positive week at the Unicameral for Republicans. The biggest change in 2023 is that people are showing up! Constitutional Carry had a large audience, the Parents’ Bill of Rights exceeded that large crowd, and then the combination of Voter ID and the Heartbeat Bill testifiers took the cake for the biggest crowd of the year. People are traveling to make sure they are on record for supporting common-sense bills at this critical hour. Numbers continue to be important. The lobbies and paid institutional voices have always been there, but the Senators are seeing the large numbers of unpaid, everyday people who are being affected by the current environment. The concern on these issues to everyday people is finally hurting at a level where they are deciding to do something about it. Your stories reinforce why Parents’ Rights, Voter ID, Babies, and laws matter! The Salvation of the State is The Watchfulness of the Citizen. The watchfulness is back. Special thanks to the County Party leaders and outside organizations for their efforts to drive attendance! We have updated the hearing times as of 3:00 Saturday around our key bills (below). These bills are at the bottom of the letter. We added a few bills to our support list after consultation with our Public Safety committee. We highlighted the times for this week (Note: Committee hearing times can change. Please double-check before driving to Lincoln). Furthermore, we heard a few need assistance in how best to submit their testimony online if they cannot make it to Lincoln. Video Tutorial: William Feely, Committeeman and Legislative Director Written Tutorial: Sue Greenwald, Committeewoman In the meantime, here is a broad brush summary of the week on key issues. Taxes No major hiccups in the plans from prior weeks. Hearings continue to move forward around significant and needed tax law changes across the state. This week’s hearings were held to limit annual increases in school districts (Caps can still be violated with a large majority of the board or people) as part of a broader plan to control property taxes. The party is strongly supporting the Constitutional Amendment presented by Senator Riepe to eliminate the Inheritance Tax. The Inheritance Tax exists in six states in the Union. We believe it should be zero and that reducing that number to five will be a good start. County Commissioners are usually the most opposed because it affects their revenue they spend. Please be in consultation with your County Commissioners to understand if they support or oppose this bill. This is yet one more tax that makes our state uncompetitive with peers. We need changes. Economy Testimony was heard for a different minimum wage for minors. This would allow a lower wage that would encourage employers to hire younger individuals who need on the job training (aka “Training Wage”) to begin their career. It would also ease the cost burden on employers who take on those new to the workforce needing their skills developed. The banking and finance committee began to discuss keeping funds out of the hands of banks with political policies as a key determinant to their business behavior. These political policies often take positions against key Nebraska economic interests like cattle, coal power, and more. Safeguarding our Treasury funds is already being done by our Treasurer. However, safeguards are being sought for the position in the future should a change in attitude occur in that role. Our current concern at the party is the amount of funds with the Nebraska Investment Council that are invested with firms that have ESG policies. It is important to note that most states have their Treasurer steward both banking and investment funds of the states. In Nebraska, the investment funds are not the responsibility of the Treasurer. Those funds are the responsibility of the Investment Council whose members are appointed by the Governor. The Council usually meets on the 9th of every month at various locations around the state. We encourage you to attend and encourage a shift away from firms with policies that work against industries that are critical to the general welfare of Nebraska. Education Parents showed up in force to testify for the Parents’ Bill of Rights. An overflow room was created for attendees as the actual hearing room was insufficient to seat everyone. We thank our Senators for spending hours into the evening (a common practice this week...please give coffee where you can) to listen to testimony. In addition, testimony was heard on a grant to recruit more teachers addressing the workforce problems. Discussions on how to address the teacher shortage were productive and an interchange of ideas was had. It should be noted that citations of teachers leaving due to teaching issues of conscience were made in hearings around Parental rights that do not fit the narrative those on the other side want to formally recognize. As a party we will continue to express the frustrations of what school bodies are forcing teachers to teach. Election Integrity Voter Identification hearings began this week. There were significant adjustments that were made this week to Senator Slama’s ID bill the day before the hearing. Senator Erdman has his own version of Voter ID between the two bills being debated. We are anticipating the inevitable blending of the two bills into one. This legislation is not optionable for the Legislature due to the Constitutional amendment. Those testifying against Voter ID do not realize how this is not an optionable choice for the legislature. Two bills submitted by the Secretary State via State Senators were also presented for consideration. Legislation on this issue is being crafted real time. We encourage you to be engaged in this process as these clauses will affect the future of our elections for many years to come. There are numerous additional bills on Voter ID coming to the floor. Public Service Commission Christian Mirch was appointed to the Public Service Commission by the Governor. Christian Mirch is a tremendous asset to the party. His experience as an attorney, cop, and a ranch hand is an incredible experience set to help this state. His legal knowledge will be a tremendous asset to serving our state. Below is our list of supported bills. We are grateful for our Republican Senators working hard to see Constitutional and conservative values through. Please pray, encourage, and continue to attend these important meetings to improve our State. Todd WatsonNEGOP Political Director | | | | | Legislative Bills 2023(Bills with hearings the week of Feb 6-Feb 10 are highlighted in yellow and tagged with the NEGOP subcommittee each represents) body:
It’s official. I’m making a special announcement in 10 days.

| |
---

Friend,

It's official. I'm making a special announcement in 12 days.

The survival of America matters. That's why I've never stopped standing for America, and I never will. America is the greatest force for good in human history, and we should never be ashamed to say that.

**[Before I make my special announcement on February 15, I am asking you to add your name to a special list of supporters.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zimu3p75jhdc0u4j9gsa47t4p5mrhrr3avg8febo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clie2o70c5h2bs "Before I make my special announcement on February 15, I am asking you to add your name to a special list of supporters.")**

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: This is exciting news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Would you like a SIGNED copy of my new book? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1591%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=jyRSgTpMi2Nagr1%2brbwvhw&sysid=1)
Would you like a SIGNED copy of my new book?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

I’m excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump’s CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don’t want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea’s Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

**[I’m granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book’s release to the general public. Will you claim your book before they run out?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658994%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GMsVoBRX%2f2HoCG5Eb%2fxcIA&sysid=1 "I’m granting you SPECIAL

I understand you’re one of the top Republican patriots in the country, so I want to make sure you get a signed copy! But there are only a limited number available and supplies are quickly running out.

Please hurry to order today.

Unapologetically American,

Mike Pompeo

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Exposing the Great Reset

name: American Briefing
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zll7sdtmsv37cbr7b1u5kc308ht0h0t9rough1io_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clie2o70clh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi1t3o1d1csnhgi5hdc26g69i37cd55tk3l3p3so_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clie2o70clh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3v23lm9kcfq4pn8ff4ank02nhkikc5o43r52tso_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clie2o70clh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmp859e4n2tis5gtbbrgavvpcsikg45j45tshano_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clie2o70clh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator –
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zur6ctkb0h5ugp1tp2h5uqsloq8kcgco1h42fkfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clieapr6cph2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvh68natnvaqkq24gtifqcaojb2vdprudcstqdk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clieapr6cph2bs)**

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7987%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=xWSiNuuG9kwk87wDmrsi6Q&sysid=1)

---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94332%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VHBEi4zPcKA2tITLJC8mvg&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94331%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TvSiPo8eTbnMdyeE8t6NUQ&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94333%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xmWoUMef1CcSoqEG2afaOw&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94331%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TvSiPo8eTbnMdyeE8t6NUQ&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94334%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1TQVHHVNYi%2b%2fNfCkGarkiA&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94345%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wbFIW2QKtoOR%2bE0WXMDkqA&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94346%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AL2FLKpKW5mWvPudMDnatA&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Have you seen what they’re doing to our kids?
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb27g7ueb895k2sghbpoauj5fepmbdian19dl3lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clie6or4c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc900d2aecbgfluoqk0lcvif73co7ra4k215pua8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clie6or4c3h2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zghudj488bsskt9usihbp1j9s3slivumco6nnag8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clie6or4c3h2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4ki7lol86g8js7291ccjj83tv9vs56g1vkl6fdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clie6or4c3h2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqor7ahukdg47e8vis76lkmivq48tuqh61hv34d0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clie6or4c3h2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5rk0p6ea024sjt1qi4cnqgmug82i50sv1mjir68_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clie6or4c3h2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0fjaug1f437gci9qahv8ggar46vhdeanbthf64g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg60oj6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zepbk5vo325pr1d0hg3iecdi0qoaes5pimcufr88_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg60oj6clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl1s3ea4kgqi19rn4vlhs50oms4uppc3aku6skkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg60oj6clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhehn7gt6pn4tq81v8g2t6v9b86m9coocl6vvle8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg60oj6clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?” This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Nikki Haley
subject: my special announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of by Stand for America PAC and SFA Inc
body:
It’s official. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7999%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=TvW0gSJWU5rDqxZNyX7HOQ&sysid=1)

| |
---
| | | | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94348%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kr2nEBVPmF3Pp8GC4dQFDQ&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

It’s official. I’m making a special announcement in 10 days.

The survival of America matters. That’s why I’ve never stopped standing for America, and I never will. America is the greatest force for good in human history, and we should never be ashamed to say that.

**[Before I make my special announcement on February 15, I am asking you to add your name to a special list of supporters.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94349%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l3Zpa29BouzajZ6Fdx07Rg&sysid=1 "Before I make my special
announcement on February 15, I am asking you to add your name to a special list of
supporters.")**

---
| | [Add Your Name](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94340%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D7ntK%2fTdpiiqqRQPOIauqA&sysid=1)
---

**[Join my list of top supporters by chipping in today.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94341%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BM2mOiV%2bi8ZoWqXY4IUbcQ&sysid=1 "Join my list of top
supporters by chipping in today.")** Together we will stand for America and uphold our nation’s values.

My very best,

---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94348%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kr2nEBVPmF3Pp8GC4dQFDQ&sysid=1)

Nikki Haley

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: In 2024, Sen. Tammy Baldwin, a real progressive, is up for reelection. Baldwin's a trailblazer, the first open lesbian ever elected to the Senate. Even though she's from a close swing state, we can always count on Senator Baldwin to lead the charge. If we want her to be there to do that in the next Congress, she needs our support now.
body:
Swing Senate seat in a swing state
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f0dd4e2-4fb4-4cfd-80be-e0bb02e1cea0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _A huge victory and a painful loss in the same state._ That's what happened in Wisconsin in the 2022 election. _We won a huge victory reelecting Governor Tony Evers over a democracy-attacking Republican. Yet, in a heartbreaking loss, _Lt. Gov Mandela Barnes lost by only 1%_ to awful Senator Ron Johnson,_ who attacks vaccines and defends AR-15s like they're part of his family. Wisconsin is a true swing state and there are no guaranteed statewide races. _**In 2024, real progressive, Senator Tammy Baldwin, is up for reelection. Baldwin's a trailblazer, the first open lesbian ever elected to the Senate. Even though she's from a close swing state, whether protecting women's reproductive autonomy, fighting to raise taxes on billionaires or doing all she can to keep our kids safe from guns in school,[we can always count on Senator Baldwin to lead the charge.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta334eb79-d970-4195-9154-7365d497784e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0eeaa16-3b52-47dd-bd1a-5b7f5a0c4fd3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _All the prognosticators have predicted we'll lose the Senate in 2024, because we have so many tough seats to defend.** And there's no world in which we lose Senator Baldwin's seat and retain a Senate majority.**_ [**_So, for the awesome trailblazing Tammy Baldwin and our Senate majority, can you join Blue Amp Action in giving Senator Baldwin $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9769f829-6d33-46b7-b3d3-a1fe15e4a9ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you so much, Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc391f3f5-ff18-4cf4-874b-181a49508aec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/tammybaldwin4-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td8e851da-2542-4f07-8d1d-c59aa1cec5a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: Disabled U.S. Marine, crew chief for Presidents, thrown in prison
body:
His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine On

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdjbsvkgshn8brkq7ast6lcskes7murtosefcqqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg6aor4cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu8sr8nt8abd14g58mel3s9apvn8d8n259v6gu7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg6aor4cph2bs)

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You’ve seen Marine One on TV countless times, I’m sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn’t charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that’s it.

His alleged crime is called “obstruction of an official proceeding.”

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn’t even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg6fbjq87c94v2ftl23b45lndpkh5fkkbojgu2m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg6aor4cph2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs866944iovc4ji92862b5qks221a35cufmtue88_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg6aor4cph2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Dear Patriot, you and I know deranged Joe Biden and his out-of-control FBI and DOJ are committing terrible crimes against the January 6 Peaceful Protesters. [**But you can help me fight back for them peacefully and legally with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1u2qpbev4rkvspeqfat6u04g2inqcgb1n80ufq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg6aor4cph2bs)

name: Protect American Values
subject: 40 Million Americans are in Trouble
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PROTECT AMERICAN VALUES, INC
body:
I've never seen a President treat the 2nd Amendment with such disregard.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62289009:6KIlHhGNv:m:1:3367311000:F016BAA4882C9494BC0D9BCBB5DFC4B1:r "ALERT") Peter: It's barely 2023 and already Brandon is trying to take away your 2nd Amendment rights! Brandon just had his ATF bypass Congress' authority to make laws and they implemented new rules that effectively create a backdoor gun registry! In about 6 months, you'll either need to remove that pistol brace off your gun or pay Uncle Sam $200 on each firearm for the privilege of using one even if the government has illegally imposed this fine on law-abiding citizens. Grandpa Joe doesn't care about your Constitutional Rights, one bit! In fact, he thinks you're the next mass murderer just because you use a pistol brace. And that's why we must take action immediately to fight his dangerous gun grab before it's too late. **[Show Brandon that you refuse to let him trample on your gun rights! Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us fight back!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62289009:6KIlHhGNv:m:1:3367311000:F016BAA4882C9494BC0D9BCBB5DFC4B1:r "Show Brandon that you refuse to let him trample on your gun
rights! Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us fight back!")** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62289009:6KIlHhGNv:m:1:3367311000:F016BAA4882C9494BC0D9BCBB5DFC4B1:r "Headline")I've never seen a President treat the 2nd Amendment with such disregard. The ATF has already been caught going to gun shops and taking pictures of records for gun buyers. The Biden Administration's attacks on law-abiding gun owners are getting more brazen by the day. Now they're creating new rules out of thin air in order to know who in this country owns a gun. **The Congressional Research Service estimates 40 Million Americans could be impacted!** If you don't step up now, we could be just months away from total gun confiscation. The consequences are grave! **[That's why you need to stand up and demand that your 2A rights WILL NOT be infringed! Show Brandon you mean business by chipping in $50, $100, or $500 today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62289009:6KIlHhGNv:m:1:3367311000:F016BAA4882C9494BC0D9BCBB5DFC4B1:r "That’s why you need to stand up and
demand that your 2A rights WILL NOT be infringed! Show Brandon you mean business by chipping in $50, $100, or $500 today!")** We can't let Grandpa Joe get away with shredding the Constitution to appease his radical leftist allies! **Biden can 't just make up laws out of thin air. Congress makes the laws, and no law could erase our gun rights or force us into an unconstitutional gun registry!** But you can't sit this fight out and hope the GOP Members of Congress will be able to stop it without your support. We all need to stand up together and pressure Congress and Brandon to end this unconstitutional overreach before it's too late. **[Donate today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62289009:6KIlHhGNv:m:1:3367311000:F016BAA4882C9494BC0D9BCBB5DFC4B1:r "Donate today!")** God Bless America,

David
Political Director
Protect American Values | | [PROTECT THE 2A!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62289009:6KIlHhGNv:m:1:3367311000:F016BAA4882C9494BC0D9BCBB5DFC4B1:r "PROTECT THE 2A!")

body:
As we look to the future of our country, we need strong and proven leaders who are ready to defend our values and protect our co

| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7urj96mok7f4d2137ns4svccedj9qokfdbh3dt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg6aor5cdh2bs)
---

Friend,

As we look to the future of our country, we need strong and proven leaders who are ready to defend our values and protect our country.

That's why I'm making a special announcement on February 15. Before I make my announcement, I am asking for you to join me in this fight for our nation's future. **[Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpnitq21qfkjhg5jnsjc4uefprod4e9rri1h983g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg6aor5cdh2bs "Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.")**

---
| | [Chip in Here](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl349m7uq53c2mpbqiu9tjeag1i3mn5elofd4vh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg6aor5cdh2bs)
---

I am proud to stand for the ideals that make our nation the greatest force for good in human history. I will never waver in this commitment--not now, not ever. I will always stand for America.

**[Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm33nc3ukoue610usi1pp1kr32kmh6acgftutcuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg6aor5cdh2bs "Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.")**

Thank you for your continued support.

---
My very best,

subject: BREAKING: Disabled U.S. Marine, crew chief for Presidents, thrown in prison
body:

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents. | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbrc5qmrvbrddrbo434fan4qfpkduecuhgqm7gn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg69oj2clh2bs)

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr0iq2fphl0g17d496ql48rf349tdslaf554ooh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg69oj2clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd9gr69jlu67bsum21fcgpr3nbbab0onmoeplmko_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg69oj2clh2bs)

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You've seen Marine One on TV countless times, I'm sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn 't charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that's it.

His alleged crime is called "obstruction of an official proceeding."

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn't even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbkr3qn3i2tojj7gqlel9jn26snau198arqsf6fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg69oj2clh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfcvgsugb2oj1hhsk82o4dkkbd6a3agdvlk3ils8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg69oj2clh2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Dear Patriot, you and I know deranged Joe Biden and his out-of-control FBI and DOJ are committing terrible crimes against the January 6 Peaceful Protesters. [**But you can help me fight back for them peacefully and legally with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl4h7es2bhh68bfingeplj5cjqaht5d4tqgm38m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdg69oj2clh2bs)

name: American Update
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1592%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=W7DdmVF3ycM%2f%2bQZ%2fDZcbJw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658920%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3omuhCMnUuVRTVv0wxi%2bqw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658920%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3omuhCMnUuVRTVv0wxi%2bqw&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658921%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qjUedB3dMoEJ87nFhu0%2f8Q&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator –
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z94ccth52t75b0nbivlrnerqad240g63i9glsum0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi68o32chh2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znq24ckd4n85ep1i6dtfeg9e1jrq7kv20ltdri40_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi68o32chh2bs)**

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbaeb0j042m6edp0be7jbq4lo7s46hp5ov6mmmig_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi68o32cph2bs)

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You’ve seen Marine One on TV countless times, I’m sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn’t charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that’s it.

His alleged crime is called “obstruction of an official proceeding.”

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn’t even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ijuriqak933h574u4fa4ok64v1m6s1u2ofes50_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi68o32cph2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg8fqhg3f39a2tmit5vth8aoi43op8422583kfj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi68o32cph2bs)

Thank you so much!

Larry Klayman

| [ California Police Shoot Dead Double Amputee, Say He Was Attempting To Flee ](http://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJxtTz1vhTAM_DUvW1A-CNAhQ5dur2tHZGLziBRIRIye-u8b9kqns3Q--c7k9TC6QY22dwK9M3paJxG9UcYqo5xu0K6zyziuBKH_UAtCsI9eXQWBqYtHjUg15FxKTpFjqF0-X2LzQVPQ00SIahiWfrWo-slp09Nkh0WhSH5jLvVhPx_mq6GcVOAk5FzOzBS4O4ibfndpQ5mbdKMAKa75PCLIOzOQrFvOLJEAJeZrSSRhLxdT28Cv3Ei-oUpgpr1wPF6Ss1wTUbslfp7zE2Jq6jfs5GOtc4uv850qjXSzFafH8o4pxTqM7fPX3vxdyLvg_-x_XXRsqg)

If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: A life-altering decision
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ce8e707988e42818ee65a49f5a1bb35&_e=7tcRs17yv8gnFDRwx9ZfY3Z3uBxxrpOP4C2ajnxcO4msUDYg5Wz7-LLp9sRIafQFPgpFJKkmeXKzkRhSTrzbkwrW8K1KTJYLUv_vUubVmr8Dq1GmvzFEQ_EmQ1qVDxoiDcmbm20n2c1jUVvVD4BVbETo54qSQ3iioLskhiG9gwzu2vIJEJV21AbjqjlSUKU4pmK1U7eYxJPW37PwOA_JsIrG-wBlHr21nC_SQJaFgQsawF57MBTiM6puJ7YgAL1PCVfGSHlMD1_sbj3Rcln9QkFuYL2Cl-K_AH_81DdugS6evT-1WD-_z_mnfQRcQP_MAEzNSPxzIpqmWQkVihx_TXzit96kD_vaBadHHReZ5qzQ-bAlOmuqcorTbWNEEoiZNJlzUyzsf8es3kPUmMhdsw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ce8e707988e42818ee65a49f5a1bb35&_e=7tcRs17yv8gnFDRwx9ZfY3Z3uBxxrpOP4C2ajnxcO4msUDYg5Wz7-LLp9sRIafQFPgpFJKkmeXKzkRhSTrzbkwrW8K1KTJYLUv_vUubVmr8Dq1GmvzFEQ_EmQ1qVDxoiDcmbm20n2c1jUVvVD4BVbETo54qSQ3iioLskhiG9gwzu2vIJEJV21AbjqjlSUKU4pmK1U7eYxJPW37PwOA_JsIrG-wBlHr21nC_SQJaFgQsawF57MBTiM6puJ7YgAL1PTlHvMCVvglEp38Esgrnuvw7fltC6eZrFmKskUnYvgyB1PPM7RRlADMsFvKeDZ49RiVqtMGAWFM7fQ9nlSimOOB5vKrU0CwJ9NHgpLO98pBfRDAHNt88fOGi6A_fSE60vPSxvpZuPD8ohr545H2j23Q%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ce8e707988e42818ee65a49f5a1bb35&_e=7tcRs17yv8gnFDRwx9ZfY3Z3uBxxrpOP4C2ajnxcO4msUDYg5Wz7-LLp9sRIafQFPgpFJKkmeXKzkRhSTrzbkwrW8K1KTJYLUv_vUubVmr8Dq1GmvzFEQ_EmQ1qVDxoiDcmbm20n2c1jUVvVD4BVbETo54qSQ3iioLskhiG9gwzu2vIJEJV21AbjqjlSUKU4pmK1U7eYxJPW37PwOA_JsIrG-wBlHr21nC_SQJaFgQsawF57MBTiM6puJ7YgAL1P7xuAagHHRqTwKiCwL8I2yhiTjMImz-uKsWYzWktzwTF92srateAtE7aqvCOuMYKru6KOV5TYVCXA_vpwc1zy-UZq-SqUtYqD7dW_rHuIdvhT-FWsSu7qoy6bGCQYzJHDWL1rufxzNmVZB054OBNfdQ%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ce8e707988e42818ee65a49f5a1bb35&_e=7tcRs17yv8gnFDRwx9ZfY3Z3uBxxrpOP4C2ajnxcO4msUDYg5Wz7-LLp9sRIafQFPgpFJKkmeXKzkRhSTrzbkwrW8K1KTJYLUv_vUubVmr8Dq1GmvzFEQ_EmQ1qVDxoiDcmbm20n2c1jUVvVD4BVbETo54qSQ3iioLskhiG9gwzu2vIJEJV21AbjqjlSUKU4pmK1U7eYxJPW37PwOA_JsIrG-wBlHr21nC_SQJaFgQsawF57MBTiM6puJ7YgAL1P12VITnlGVdtqL0FecGA8x6c6FC9ifS6yLYP0lytpWEgNCSvAPhRon-5K7tDtcRYyi8XLAGiQkTd_bMLqAxXi1W9XPH4R08xMkKl4nmf21FUXGrhgKgUNXz0AIIBsk8xUtQPZEkV7FhM2crF48ZiBwQ%3D%3D) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ce8e707988e42818ee65a49f5a1bb35&_e=7tcRs17yv8gnFDRwx9ZfY3Z3uBxxrpOP4C2ajnxcO4msUDYg5Wz7-LLp9sRIafQFPgpFJKkmeXKzkRhSTrzbkwrW8K1KTJYLUv_vUubVmr8Dq1GmvzFEQ_EmQ1qVDxoiDcmbm20n2c1jUVvVD4BVbETo54qSQ3iioLskhiG9gwzu2vIJEJV21AbjqjlSUKU4pmK1U7eYxJPW37PwOA_JsIrG-wBlHr21nC_SQJaFgQsawF57MBTiM6puJ7YgAL1PV2de5WVldwq2tEkgp0S07L9-ShhP5uxlqh_CMyJcNIw2emMwzumnPy6yYBjKa47p52OE_1pLsl_JscbBrPFjhBbXK-Ll-rYOL2j7j0b9xhZjAiVQUSTRSVU9OcwybcfUl4NrKcCSnFM-PD9l240ODQ%3D%3D)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ce8e707988e42818ee65a49f5a1bb35&_e=7tcRs17yv8gnFDRwx9ZfY3Z3uBxxrpOP4C2ajnxcO4msUDYg5Wz7-LLp9sRIafQFPgpFJKkmeXKzkRhSTrzbkwrW8K1KTJYLUv_vUubVmr8Dq1GmvzFEQ_EmQ1qVDxoiDcmbm20n2c1jUVvVD4BVbETo54qSQ3iioLskhiG9gwzu2vIJEJV21AbjqjlSUKU4pmK1U7eYxJPW37PwOA_JsIrG-wBlHr21nC_SQJaFgQsawF57MBTiM6puJ7YgAL1PsDxZ3aMHf_j2k7vZ1RmUfjV7fuEz5jFf48kbRgckiymIMZulqgaBgbGGYJCoPm8bKFQJwQ6G26Z90LElxmvAJYQnfBqivk18PAxEG5RerttKJXhkNAt83XG3xGlG6LxxcSyl6co9-PU8lT_u3S27Ag%3D%3D) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ce8e707988e42818ee65a49f5a1bb35&_e=7tcRs17yv8gnFDRwx9ZfY3Z3uBxxrpOP4C2ajnxcO4msUDYg5Wz7-LLp9sRIafQFPgpFJKkmeXKzkRhSTrzbkwrW8K1KTJYLUv_vUubVmr8Dq1GmvzFEQ_EmQ1qVDxoiDcmbm20n2c1jUVvVD4BVbETo54qSQ3iioLskhiG9gwzu2vIJEJV21AbjqjlSUKU4pmK1U7eYxJPW37PwOA_JsIrG-wBlHr21nC_SQJaFgQsawF57MBTiM6puJ7YgAL1PNuiYSoVfwES2lWkdlb1r9-xjdn2_dlxGu8NE7AvM44KBNJs9JD1xN_s-2xZq-cGWIwKUSxRvh1OMgm8G_NimsQEOPdMXEXJQ72knrLXTBdVYuDlRmkN_zx6As-iGm5DEeTSuO0LB5uogN8aK20kJYA%3D%3D)
