| | [**DONATE NOW**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ce8e707988e42818ee65a49f5a1bb35&_e=7tcRs17yv8gnFDRwx9ZfY3Z3uBxxrpOP4C2ajnxcO4msUDYg5Wz7-LLp9sRIafQFPgpFJKkmeXKzkRhSTrzbkwrW8K1KTJYLUv_vUubVmr8Dq1GmvzFEQ_EmQ1qVDxoiDcmbm20n2c1jUVvVD4BVbETo54qSQ3iioLskhiG9gwzu2vIJEJV21AbjqjlSUKU4pmK1U7eYxJPW37PwOA_JsIrG-wBlHr21nC_SQJaFgQsawF57MBTiM6puJ7YgAL1PHHhgL7RGDYYJoKbdeOaiuRi0EgpDFp7qFRAA3Oyj9h6Td-_FTNXfGY2TffaHm2o_d078YoPrP3-2gLC77dsxCBhP6cwpLXGf_qKFdO_IdmIdhoXlQxqRRDPhrYF7Tnm8bmNWH5B5VB38VTJS5dm1yg%3D%3D)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4olsc0d6hqvjpok49p7lh3gb1pbb39tas0vjekg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi64o76c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z64vd7d8se0lb085444b83980roa328ap8r8d0i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi64o76c9h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm1icngor5vrve9952rfgri2l3jlpiibsdf51j38_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi64o76c9h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zh2gcgjh25t3qup1atga7hnevqlg9cbdkii2kva8).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c3d22f546494ebd98f41589afb2e148&_e=3fPcFLxHRNibTeR9k5iGbvXEaujGjLGBQv05q2A6e8i0TuLBwewtHdd6dGEZrUaRNC3DbQWKhnXIEig4Hywaq7Mim7ZligRV4v2ZwbToBFJY_VcSb5Ld5ypj80PiYTHG4Y29cJjULTaQRkgSLrjAhlPrbSbu3uCvnXL6_h9jNNzRnHiCsX_awE4FfqYuaajr2GZTiVosMuYgCrnu_XK0hHUlIqEHz_ACfdbVyLpaVKsxLqH-emdPApjbY1lBu3yRoN9mIFMZ7Fupxp9xoUtgRklK1FXK5fS3NSiHt4UavMgcI0bfvclx8c-dUKLcaWBG)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c3d22f546494ebd98f41589afb2e148&_e=3fPcFLxHRNibTeR9k5iGbvXEaujGjLGBQv05q2A6e8i0TuLBwewtHdd6dGEZrUaRNC3DbQWKhnXIEig4Hywaq7Mim7ZligRV4v2ZwbToBFJY_VcSb5Ld5ypj80PiYTHG4Y29cJjULTaQRkgSLrjAhgGQuzCcqS2VzW7hnb48LB_emmkAdlxv19K7N15igGsWcECdnEEbW1B4wMAEeeaRpQfxhtZ3rLRl7_pP4SsBckNKFzTbLy6hi1zONE-FAuLHjhwasUMXiIqAIj-KJqFYZLdwQmGbCRABgNJnYL5iAr-csi6KKpfTpXkTcxC6W3wT)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c3d22f546494ebd98f41589afb2e148&_e=3fPcFLxHRNibTeR9k5iGbvXEaujGjLGBQv05q2A6e8i0TuLBwewtHdd6dGEZrUaRNC3DbQWKhnXIEig4Hywaq7Mim7ZligRV4v2ZwbToBFJY_VcSb5Ld5ypj80PiYTHG4Y29cJjULTaQRkgSLrjAhpzKwfkN6ScTmZTJ5rgidGOckqlOsvfrR8Gecd_xOLpT8ZKTqy29z-ADjaAsjzuqz3U1OWqWXq8x1Fj9eJyRM0mOJFCkovMaMqKoqiHaU9qSj8QqPhYXQGWUKNpgk2FfymnML7nU0v5I_aPzw5VLZ1YEFLJbuQev7R6ECLm6aOBL)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c3d22f546494ebd98f41589afb2e148&_e=3fPcFLxHRNibTeR9k5iGbvXEaujGjLGBQv05q2A6e8i0TuLBwewtHdd6dGEZrUaRNC3DbQWKhnXIEig4Hywaq7Mim7ZligRV4v2ZwbToBFJY_VcSb5Ld5ypj80PiYTHG4Y29cJjULTaQRkgSLrjAhpcp023ZkO2N73IXUTccAQrCsGZxJGGRoNE31GOhbCxp5vVHrXqCxEC2oqcmwxUxI_11sb10n_SJC34n08eO1KexjK16Hwf98yhzp5PYBYxB61cgG5rkuiaYydyMLgv-8aSPbK0wdbty1EW7LB3Am_3CYKuTI7pFW4bqPpq2HbpL) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c3d22f546494ebd98f41589afb2e148&_e=3fPcFLxHRNibTeR9k5iGbvXEaujGjLGBQv05q2A6e8i0TuLBwewtHdd6dGEZrUaRNC3DbQWKhnXIEig4Hywaq7Mim7ZligRV4v2ZwbToBFJY_VcSb5Ld5ypj80PiYTHG4Y29cJjULTaQRkgSLrjAhkDPpFIlECwDB1LEx8O4wiuBAQLB0vfJdNEoKp5kiTuNSBk3COGcsu9YffTuHmN5K_3qf7WALpnn9eT-N7U2qsx1_jLDSMIIvO1D8_lkDtxmjZjRQnQNCRdpiQjBkBNRzob_ftyMDiGGYOK_dSm1xpxHPRhqV5xieSnsYeBKTxpP)

The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c3d22f546494ebd98f41589afb2e148&_e=3fPcFLxHRNibTeR9k5iGbvXEaujGjLGBQv05q2A6e8i0TuLBwewtHdd6dGEZrUaRNC3DbQWKhnXIEig4Hywaq7Mim7ZligRV4v2ZwbToBFJY_VcSb5Ld5ypj80PiYTHG4Y29cJjULTaQRkgSLrjAhgL2VgrmqBHKDcKO2qVRhVQU2L7PeV3HF1Qx5SPrfnLsd4NdvsgmQXV15XWqO-0wME-S1eMmbbC3ULEyD0YlVyYhfwRP5INyx1Rqshja6NiVRu8xh6X2QUnNK0boW0IsEU-dfem8C2W3RCujwAqOgmK1IDfaKe3GUKuDPjSM73PE) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The ATF cannot be trusted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Peter,

The ATF cannot be trusted and needs to GO!

The ATF has been nothing more than an enforcer for the D.C. gun grabbers to strip away our right to bear arms.

The truth is, the ATF has been looking for ways to expand its powers, and it would like nothing more than to **make criminals out of millions of law-abiding Americans by implementing Joe Biden's assault on our 2nd Amendment rights.**

That's why I'm leading the fight to abolish the ATF.

**[I'm asking my top supporters to stand with me TODAY by signing your"Abolish the ATF" petition and become a Citizen Co-sponsor in the fight to defang Joe Biden's anti-gun attack dogs](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61464632:sxDcWGDNc:m:1:2365227053:506C1094470729A33C616C4D436F3D9E:r).**

| | [ ABOLISH THE ATF, Sign NOW >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61464632:sxDcWGDNc:m:1:2365227053:506C1094470729A33C616C4D436F3D9E:r)
---

The ATF's mere existence is becoming increasingly unwarranted and their obsession with turning peaceful gun owners into felons for exercising their 2nd Amendment rights MUST be stopped.

Every moment this federal agency is allowed to endure gives the gun-grabbers another opportunity to stomp on our Constitutional right to bear arms.

But now could be our best chance to uproot the notoriously anti-gun ATF and the Biden Administration's plot to disarm EVERY American.

**_This is our moment to fight like hell to abolish one of the most tyrannical agencies that our nation has ever known._**

And if I can rally thousands of law-abiding gun owners to **[sign this petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61464632:sxDcWGDNc:m:1:2365227053:506C1094470729A33C616C4D436F3D9E:r)** , Biden and the anti-gun activists in Congress will be forced to reconsider their assault on our 2nd Amendment rights by reining in the ATF.

_Sincerely,_

Matt Gaetz (R-FL)

* * *
| **Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**

subject: BREAKING: Disabled U.S. Marine, crew chief for Presidents, thrown in prison
body:

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents. | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoqju7lkr5a244lpojb5ijmk0f766t4fdrggtsv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi62or4c3h2bs)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrfuacb7lhdvkaddkdbva2ql4e54rd1c5trh4m0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi62or4c3h2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1g3kdv62bg3g00css8dq1s9im5og0havnvvsrg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi62or4c3h2bs)

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You've seen Marine One on TV countless times, I'm sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn 't charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that's it.

His alleged crime is called "obstruction of an official proceeding."

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn't even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1aosc1qmlhcogdqe200mqifk0fipmd1q9hvvnk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi62or4c3h2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5vjdqeu9prq2uokrb7lfao1fndfa6libf0dhel0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi62or4c3h2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Dear Patriot, you and I know deranged Joe Biden and his out-of-control FBI and DOJ are committing terrible crimes against the January 6 Peaceful Protesters. [**But you can help me fight back for them peacefully and legally with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z43msemuboruglmln5d2a4sr3div8k6k69n06ai0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi62or4c3h2bs)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101”
| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z26bd9p54hvv74o0lh9fsl7h9emrlbjtj635679o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi62or2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkvs5opi59f3kojb2er4fi0v8pt0hji1nic5b28g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi62or2c1h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd88bg09fv5n2dhk8uednbcv1p7dj0lo4h81nn8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi62or2c1h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator –
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zob9e3eiku09rsrsg0lvkpkjkojs0rig2kq3oke8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi62or4cjh2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhv5k33hf81nom54aeqb4720t63i2n1uo72bq30g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdi62or4cjh2bs)**

Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - thousands of names long. You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: backstory on my campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi there –
It is the honor of my lifetime to serve in the Senate. Working to make life better for Granite Staters is something that deserves my full attention.
That’s why I’m sending you this email. Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and we’re under a time crunch to fill the gap. If you could split $20 right now -- between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
The backstory is this:
GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win.
My team was laser-focused on making strategic decisions that would allow us to win. We made last-minute investments with the information we had, hoping that the funding we needed would come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.
Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to my campaign and Serve America to help us retire our debt? Every dollar you give helps me spend less time fundraising and more time fighting for hardworking families, and I’m grateful for anything you can give. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Thank you so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

body:
She’d do it, too
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb1ea05a-5688-4358-96e3-be680630e375/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **_She means what she said: "Impeach Joe Biden"_** _This is the obsession of clownish security threat and holder of Kevin McCarthy's leash, Marjorie Taylor Greene. Why? She doesn't know. She'll work it out later. _ **_The President has presided over a term that must be mentioned in the same breath as FDR's. We just learned we had 2.9% economic growth the last quarter of 2022, unemployment is at a 50 year low, and in some states such as Wisconsin, Georgia, Arizona, Montana, West Virginia and more, it is the lowest it has EVER been. Biden has lowered the Trump Deficit by $1.8 Trillion--yep, that's with a T._** But the corporate media won't tell you this, except in passing before the move onto Hunter Biden's laptop, because they're scared of the right-wing owners of their outlets, feel the need to *both sides* everything or are just looking for clicks on their story, no matter the cost to our democracy. So We must share the truth about what Joe Biden has done. _**For example, he got Republicans to support bipartisan measures, passing a huge, job-creating infrastructure bill and the first gun-safety bill in a generation. ****But, he also wasn't scared to push ahead by himself when Republicans acted in bad faith. The historic Inflation Reduction Act, CHIPS legislation, bringing high-paying manufacturing jobs back home, helping students in debt to predatory lenders, funding historically Black universities, reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act and much more.**_ [_**Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight for Joe Biden's presidency. **_**_There will be never be a more important race in our lifetimes than this one._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b610ea5-450c-4e19-8855-a82eaa10d62f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**When the midterm approached, The President--in an important rhetorical move--called out MAGA "semi-fascists."** The result? **Per historian Michael Beschloss, President Biden had the strongest midterm congressional showing of any President in 88 years. **Yet, again, you'd think Republicans would be happy with a stronger more prosperous America. But you'd be wrong. This was the response from the real leader of the GOP House Caucus, who takes Kevin McCarthy for his dog walk eveyr while telling him "good boy," and making her demands:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08229aa1-685f-4d9f-a394-4ce7c4b3c9a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, She means what she said: "Impeach Joe Biden" This is the obsession of clownish security threat and holder of Kevin McCarthy's leash, Marjorie Taylor Greene. Why? She doesn't know. She'll work it out later. The President has presided over a term that must be mentioned in the same breath as FDR's. We just learned we had 2.9% economic growth the last quarter of 2022, unemployment is at a 50 year low, and in some states such as Wisconsin, Georgia, Arizona, Montana, West Virginia and more, it is the lowest it has EVER been. Biden has lowered the Trump Deficit by $1.8 Trillion--yep, that's with a T. But the corporate media won't tell you this, except in passing before the move onto Hunter Biden's laptop, because they're scared of the right-wing owners of their outlets, feel the need to both sides everything or are just looking for clicks on their story, no matter the cost to our democracy. So We must share the truth about what Joe Biden has done. For example, he got Republicans to support bipartisan measures, passing a huge, job-creating infrastructure bill and the first gun-safety bill in a generation. But, he also wasn't scared to push ahead by himself when Republicans acted in bad faith. The historic Inflation Reduction Act, CHIPS legislation, bringing high-paying manufacturing jobs back home, helping students in debt to predatory lenders, funding historically Black universities, reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act and much more. When the midterm approached, The President--in an important rhetorical move--called out MAGA "semi-fascists." The result? Per historian Michael Beschloss, President Biden had the strongest midterm congressional showing of any President in 88 years. Yet, again, you'd think Republicans would be happy with a stronger more prosperous America. But you'd be wrong. This was the response from the real leader of the GOP House Caucus, who takes Kevin McCarthy for his dog walk eveyr while telling him "good boy," and making her demands: | | | | | | | | The authoritarian Republican Party will do whatever it takes to destroy Joe Biden--sabotage our economy, do the bidding of foreign dictators, even attack our Capitol, as we saw two years ago January 6th. As President Biden approaches his State of the Union address and announcing his presidential reelection campaign, please j oin us in backing President Joe Biden and ensuring Marjorie Taylor Greene's party isn't rewarded for betraying our country--- Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3379de4a09594097a45cee2d02fadcb3&_e=y56Ls8bqg8uKWW7Ydy5yDeLZYwkpIXB1uEaFQIERIM0k2_YKa_hGckW4C2OXONAPqYRSx7y9mTWjqEHCYcY3OBKMUbbspmqyglh3T-YpkgxD6dRZk8wSR1__78M8uBeHhFkBuqIYw4wWHogiUHuPrTtaO3R8pe602pHfvN7WqA0eQEISYoz-3xGkMEOc-UPWYrbFcBlDWx4jt1kFgds1OF26CTBXzMIV9v7TUloeLdROckwCZn0hJXMc66CpAzYVyI60gizqkAfayTEXMyrH4oTvnxQAqGMsiAL2b2WX1RsvozKf-ra-6e6I2kLgJPdHXX3YdS7fc_JDOX4TncRABe66xCA_x6KTXKYPowuEUlv5zuvKvGbxJf5EeP2d5tGxT2FclLZL_2ZZBkd0TsgZXw%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: I am an American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ilhan for Congress
body:
When you push power, power pushes back. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58307337/390688784/-1230998127?refcode=em230205-1-7-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWY1Y2ZhMC03YWE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M1GirHiRJO5D2dbPzF4nUKofJhNHfHLFgrbFvuaii70=&emci=3e6cd199-7aa5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=8af5cfa0-7aa5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=35610790)
---
Who gets to be an American? What opinions do you have to have to be counted as an American? That's what the debate over my removal from the House Foreign Affairs Committee was all about. The idea that you are suspect if you are an immigrant, or from a certain part of the world, of a certain skin tone, or a Muslim. Well, I am a Muslim. And an immigrant. And a Somali, a woman, a mother, a refugee, a Minnesotan, a progressive, and an American, too. Is anyone surprised that I am a target? That I am somehow deemed unworthy to speak on American foreign policy? Or that I am seen as a powerful voice that needs to be silenced? One thing I have learned in my life is that when you push power, power pushes back — and nobody can take on that struggle alone. So please: [**Can you make a contribution — of $5 or anything you can — to stand with me? Continuing to expand our ideas of who is an American and who can partake in the American experiment is a good thing. No matter how much the right wing in this country may hate it, I am an American. clean_body: When you push power, power pushes back. | Who gets to be an American? What opinions do you have to have to be counted as an American? That's what the debate over my removal from the House Foreign Affairs Committee was all about. The idea that you are suspect if you are an immigrant, or from a certain part of the world, of a certain skin tone, or a Muslim. Well, I am a Muslim. And an immigrant. And a Somali, a woman, a mother, a refugee, a Minnesotan, a progressive, and an American, too. Is anyone surprised that I am a target? That I am somehow deemed unworthy to speak on American foreign policy? Or that I am seen as a powerful voice that needs to be silenced? One thing I have learned in my life is that when you push power, power pushes back — and nobody can take on that struggle alone. So please: = = Representation matters. Continuing to expand our ideas of who is an American and who can partake in the American experiment is a good thing. No matter how much the right wing in this country may hate it, I am an American. An American who was elected and sent to Congress by the people of Minnesota's 5th district to represent them. That is what the whole debate was all about. There's this idea out there that I'm unable to make objective decisions because of who I am or where I come from. I reject that idea, 100%. Every member of Congress uses our perspective, our points of view, our lived experience, and the voice of our constituents to make decisions. That's what democracy is all about. That is why, no matter what they throw at me, I will never stop speaking up as a voice for those who have none. I will continue to speak up for the sake of little kids who wonder who is speaking up for them. For families seeking justice, whether it's here at home or around the world. I know that I cannot do it alone — the only way that our movement can continue our fight against injustice, wherever it may be, is together. So please: = I did not come to Congress to be silent. And I promise you that my leadership and my commitment to a better world will not diminish if I am not on a committee for one term. Thank you for reading. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar = Ilhan for Congress or ILHAN PAC PO Box 33079 Washington, DC 20033 United States | mailto:info@ilhanomar.com | | Paid for by Ilhan for Congress

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3sd1algu3p3enq8qc0h4kpt3adbsbs9sb33u3f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdh68o74cph2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaq8ekbgr2ec7cuee0349jnp1mv8si1993v1ota0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdh68o74cph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z40m3ktoac5p7q72tn7hnbld9ad3henp0tabquho_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdh68o74cph2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | ---|--- | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. ** You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You've seen Marine One on TV countless times, I'm sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn 't charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that's it.

His alleged crime is called "obstruction of an official proceeding."

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn't even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df06d4964ec842189f356f11479d7c8e&_e=Dgk1Y111c-eU3KI5p8vc9QHKBq6oGorbo6JJYUVGe1V7krmVuSn6IU8YmTHool2suRhPqqT_mxDNQgmEunki9CeFmji1LaAWVy-Bn1t8zThqyCWipK4tRroFto8TnCvAEUzsv6LjdUvsb3wZrivABH9IBfAKmjtqgCSzMzsdpFZyzAC0AAk9-PpD-jWfleVNWDwtDOq81_PMeGEYAj1qiD29qHtyWlgvT4OCwgP6Gz_cSFW8UoRFACZz6eyyFVW5p37Cu3F_QPh50CmKy8OYRH4GCg-G9aiTSTUR8maPXKiH8vemU5DbXmcOd_BFk234jt1GU6xQTyCCuP4RWXlOYbMB0xc02l_yaMo6GMqUX9GW7x8BfY2UrqZ0E59iKCOJpHs0c2qayEWbb67McV8xQy-kR0Qo9ZvUJGK6g4Idvnf6YeLhYd2GnPfh_aWoDu85)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df06d4964ec842189f356f11479d7c8e&_e=Dgk1Y111c-eU3KI5p8vc9QHKBq6oGorbo6JJYUVGe1V7krmVuSn6IU8YmTHool2suRhPqqT_mxDNQgmEunki9CeFmji1LaAWVy-Bn1t8zThqyCWipK4tRroFto8TnCvAEUzsv6LjdUvsb3wZrivABH9IBfAKmjtqgCSzMzsdpFZyzAC0AAk9-PpD-jWfleVNWDwtDOq81_PMeGEYAj1qiD29qHtyWlgvT4OCwgP6Gz_cSFW8UoRFACZz6eyyFVW5p37Cu3F_QPh50CmKy8OYRGANGL3X9fPFiwXUDfkcMI--4Vqzu1DKADIjOpap0HQxMQ9ZEXENXkKPv6uMq6Iryew7hJhkTVZj2Oe_j30iYyhPB_hORhpevKtJJ1PSHNQ9RYmQR_956m1S6shi7C2zYK5B7ktJEVK1vm8g7NKeWE4pzRfy6nKiC-tGkbVcphu4)" which you can now own on DVD.

| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df06d4964ec842189f356f11479d7c8e&_e=Dgk1Y111c-eU3KI5p8vc9QHKBq6oGorbo6JJYUVGe1V7krmVuSn6IU8YmTHool2suRhPqqT_mxDNQgmEunki9CeFmji1LaAWVy-Bn1t8zThqyCWipK4tRroFto8TnCvAEUzsv6LjdUvsb3wZrivABH9IBfAKmjtqgCSzMzsdpFZyzAC0AAk9-PpD-jWfleVNWDwtDOq81_PMeGEYAj1qiD29qHtyWlgvT4OCwgP6Gz_cSFW8UoRFACZz6eyyFVW5p37Cu3F_QPh50CmKy8OYRJo47B22dTxqPLmGrmSjtCZUZ8apJl5qADnTcLzUZMSRqijvnGgVg8Minj88Xhf2HXIYC36-6tUFNL0KYnda3VuQy23efvUgWwanRoz1CEuBZqdud7jcOJZEOzU9dYz1-Rz8O2WZ45cgLXgYErwoAvu4gVk5yU_WXepeMd6idxKK)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df06d4964ec842189f356f11479d7c8e&_e=Dgk1Y111c-eU3KI5p8vc9QHKBq6oGorbo6JJYUVGe1V7krmVuSn6IU8YmTHool2suRhPqqT_mxDNQgmEunki9CeFmji1LaAWVy-Bn1t8zThqyCWipK4tRroFto8TnCvAEUzsv6LjdUvsb3wZrivABH9IBfAKmjtqgCSzMzsdpFZyzAC0AAk9-PpD-jWfleVNWDwtDOq81_PMeGEYAj1qiD29qHtyWlgvT4OCwgP6Gz_cSFW8UoRFACZz6eyyFVW5p37Cu3F_QPh50CmKy8OYRGD5_pM1dd6uyaJbOqBf2z5xu8Rl3t4m6pFBKOjg-M0cESj1is7ifJm8DjUJ_W0Ppjtw65H2CuFVluL_T2fYtA12qFWRxiRfhGWWI2zZ9hUQ0wvA4972JiLiQ652GNhLI4b-ccJWkR9iQgFJGgb_G0yuzmMMiG8U0MbYaA5sKxDT).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4l7br6j7noqpufb8iib166bv9ejtj0ofb5n04eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdh6cor4chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zseshb1hpujqothgsk15biug3or0s52kmgmk5cp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdh6cor4chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3sukte172qlbldfnn19273auhkrehm96ufh8b8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdh6cor4chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8jq2frf267256fandge7kjsjrar8uj27kajq31o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdh6cor4chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Friend,

It's official. I'm making a special announcement in 10 days.

The survival of America matters. That's why I've never stopped standing for America, and I never will. America is the greatest force for good in human history, and we should never be ashamed to say that.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: my special announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of by Stand for America PAC and SFA Inc
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6265382a0f614544ba927713729fb886&_e=nmWIO6pACfyTw8Nigu3qTYo0etGELPE9G-T0a3LVAjEhO8LD55sEjABpilP4t1DaEWsJ6LsNUfdCUqbWE_qithDwGI5mqhqBzwqSeCaYLsX7dIX97vHM0t9Grd1e14knl018SbgMEUyFYEodgmCcqoggIaQQUPpAwSpUgYzHVLhjkBbIZCtfS6tHBjkXsO6emEz1E3oZ6ro-vmxQ3G0Dmoy0HlGyQUsK4icV6f-Yv9I1n1VMI-H9q1rpU4Q-MnpExqFtLgFdJjRGH2BruCfeablARM_WgbZ6yS6wXX9Vibr1rwi0E-FMrlnUMl4_XmDSGceCTJ4kAZKbZn8a0aNEYWUu5QYpzVWnQ_oeULsrZfljcEeKKzq_h4wSSB14II8dD2Z-unRBz34mJip6YafVBJwYYgnPelCvVnw2AC0ziDmt-GbPGd_exBAQtqT7iBnqQGxQ8qcc--HweRAOu9ftC3xAQN6JkzUq3ZEFrhd-KBB_P8328rSmTUGtSS2l7yOE2-kZjBgMmOCjEJ57bXEwin0gPIQwd6L8yPoTXwoKwBfgUO2skMvugbD7ge9FjrKOmgKK5oFh7lR9ngedWoOi1L6Xk23UZmCuvQXIXhkHuS_SuGey9NG7acPJ8Osa8LVzREyRB7vWMgwf4BbW0tdhnw%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

It's official. I'm making a special announcement in 10 days.

The survival of America matters. That's why I've never stopped standing for America, and I never will. America is the greatest force for good in human history, and we should never be ashamed to say that.

**[Before I make my special announcement on February 15, I am asking you to add your name to a special list of supporters.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6265382a0f614544ba927713729fb886&_e=nmWIO6pACfyTw8Nigu3qTYo0etGELPE9G-T0a3LVAjEhO8LD55sEjABpilP4t1DaEWsJ6LsNUfdCUqbWE_qithDwGI5mqhqBzwqSeCaYLsX7dIX97vHM0t9Grd1e14knl018SbgMEUyFYEodgmCcqoggIaQQUPpAwSpUgYzHVLhjkBbIZCtfS6tHBjkXsO6emEz1E3oZ6ro-vmxQ3G0Dmoy0HlGyQUsK4icV6f-Yv9I1n1VMI-H9q1rpU4Q-MnpExqFtLgFdJjRGH2BruCfeablARM_WgbZ6yS6wXX9Vibr1rwi0E-FMrlnUMl4_XmDSGceCTJ4kAZKbZn8a0aNEYWUu5QYpzVWnQ_oeULsrZfljcEeKKzq_h4wSSB14II8dD2Z-unRBz34mJip6YafVBJwYYgnPelCvVnw2AC0ziDmt-GbPGd_exBAQtqT7iBnqQGxQ8qcc--HweRAOu9ftC3xAQN6JkzUq3ZEFrhd-KBB_P8328rSmTUGtSS2l7yOEgXnx0UG8ViXTLtra63QwESbx_9jD2-zK9efst5mL21BGqpCaYWhvXghdC1htqtJuFtrLu93wFQMGfAOj7SOvPGYow5UObHLgctpPLHaqYqklDHeWkClfe9dSv5BBupfAo5hgn_hxvpCCZXWmfgL_-A%3D%3D "Before I make my special announcement on February 15, I am asking you to add your name to a special list of supporters.")**

name: Team Cooper
subject: NC ranks 48th in public school funding. We HAVE to solve this crisis.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Add your name to Roy’s petition calling on the GOP to help >>>
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58299562/390660441/823540626?refcode=ea.d83eabc3-65a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d83eabc3-65a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODNlYWJjMy02NWE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNSsyJqiJys2fs-taA7yLYS6MSdYw5HMv0_l5F1pJuI=&emci=637737ce-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=d83eabc3-65a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, As governor, Roy has been a steadfast advocate for our educators, students, and public school systems. Growing up, his mom was a public school teacher, and he went through North Carolina public schools, too, so he knows how critical quality public education truly is. _Roy is determined to ensure that our public school system has the funding to help every student succeed._ Unfortunately, North Carolina currently ranks 48th in K-12 per-pupil funding. Peter, this is a problem we can solve — but only if Republican legislators agree to set political differences aside and prioritize our students, teachers, and school staff. **[If you agree that our NC public schools should have the funds to provide an excellent education for every student, please, add your name to Roy’s petition now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58299564/390660443/280263350?refcode=ea.d83eabc3-65a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d83eabc3-65a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODNlYWJjMy02NWE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNSsyJqiJys2fs-taA7yLYS6MSdYw5HMv0_l5F1pJuI=&emci=637737ce-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=d83eabc3-65a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** No matter where they live or how much money their parents make, every child in our state has the right to learn. Our schools must be able to prepare students for a competitive job market, and students must be ready for postsecondary education or vocational training — whichever is right for them. Peter, Roy is committed to our public schools, teachers and students, and he won’t stop fighting until they’re granted the necessary resources. But we can’t solve this crisis without buy-in from legislative Republicans. **[Roy is calling on Republicans in Raleigh to join us and remedy our public school funding crisis. Sign on to show your support>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58299566/390660445/280263350?refcode=ea.d83eabc3-65a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d83eabc3-65a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODNlYWJjMy02NWE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNSsyJqiJys2fs-taA7yLYS6MSdYw5HMv0_l5F1pJuI=&emci=637737ce-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=d83eabc3-65a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58299568/390660447/280263350?refcode=ea.d83eabc3-65a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d83eabc3-65a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODNlYWJjMy02NWE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNSsyJqiJys2fs-taA7yLYS6MSdYw5HMv0_l5F1pJuI=&emci=637737ce-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=d83eabc3-65a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)

name: LucasKunce.com
subject: Our most important endorsement yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Will you become one of the first grassroots supporters to officially endorse Lucas Kunce in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race?
#
It’s official, Peter.
**Lucas Kunce is running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.**
The momentum we’ve seen over the last month has been incredible, but now we’ve got to keep it going.

Peter, Dinners with Kevin McCarthy.. lunches with private equity... donor spa retreats... trips to Switzerland... weekly massages: it seems like Kyrsten Sinema has all the time in the world for everyone except her own constituents. Sinema has still has NEVER held a real, public town hall meeting since she became a Senator – one that is advertised with advance notice and open to all constituents to ask questions. That’s why we’re demanding she do so now. **[Have you signed our petition yet? Can you share it with friends to sign? Peter, As the only meteorologist in Congress, I care deeply about how we can harness science and technology to combat climate change. That’s why I was proud to be named to the House Science, Space and Technology Committee, but you can probably imagine my shock and disappointment when Kevin McCarthy tried to seat confirmed con artist George Santos to serve on this committee as well.[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFjp9fmILQ_deZQ6ebndsZ42mchvxjaIm-PhpDIdKgB_Ced3Z5cEb12eJLwOcZ_j7PC-e8MSMQvDF6qxvUhJ2zNst9-VI4Ik---K9M1SJ_oIeOq7CLViDPXhjvJ15BesoDBkFArqvmCO0YKAUSXu051usGHbhpYAV_AXfUJd5PUPzkL-73LiHaoQ_Iafzn3S0B0UGFPTsvIaLhHs0y5hMmvNZuRNwfj7RoqAeS0tBXmoqfrvtZbKUUC7DazVeyVHd8rYZpM2a7wDiGMThq2-uFqZXyp6Bn6VOBFm2cVsQpMtJomjPSI9t7yxaqbdpDTSrPlsc_MbqMS6QdoYp1zsmQok8kLYUxbSxSVzUJ1s5gIoQ57vwlVfgj53wG5F3W6T5IQ/3tg/6xR4OCC0Tie-XmcT7Jdgzg/h1/jg46qSItxCOkuy0oHtIRxkUPmKVFKxf-93hsEqkaZIM)

| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFmRdCkZj2O6tQdcZT3AJbV3A0eavctnQWDTG7EMgboSplQzxO9Y3nUBPTxVb0iKB29dE_ZG2neNffTaq1RseW3g8OpLolUu5rYkrRUkZeiTt6BiCBo4tzpH-m0MZI9G_4aIICf1GHvgjHKDBaxvt6PeIsU3obDvEL-Gi9td51iwHTnH5oPuUatp4hmUjYKDN8k5FHsAFDQMF5MswsUjPw5BI25oNzNMVUSZojSA0MhdvAaaFgOGJFBHndQupGI4oQBGWHMvVHwPqSwwPMQ4I-jUuRyD4cHSvVCMXPz52QPFxQMPzvcoy6Vg8F7vCUfdA_n4car6HJT9Gx0T5ist12fYznLAAVE9EkGU0JsnNVujBFRYr0ld_p2W4vj-bh4wuVQ/3tg/6xR4OCC0Tie-XmcT7Jdgzg/h2/dZpvdBoOuE2k3xK00LWEv_F0xENGRP2vhZ3EF1hyOpE)
---
By now, you know the story of George Santos. To win votes, he blatantly lied to voters about the jobs he held, the university he attended, and even claimed to be Jewish. The guy went so far as to change his own name! **But what’s almost worse is that his campaign actually railed against pro-environmental policies and at one point called renewable energy a “scam.”** Well, it turns out the real scam was George Santos all along. The fact that Kevin McCarthy tried to appoint Santos to the science committee speaks volumes about his priorities. The GOP could care less about the truth or science, but what they do want is a loyal rubber stamp for their terrible agenda. I’m relieved Santos was pressured to step down (at least for now 🙄), but the idea that Santos would have a say on science policy should concern everyone. **Santos and the GOP value politics over the truth, but I still believe in making science and facts a basis for decision-making. I suspect you do too,****Peter****, so I’m asking for your help to defend integrity and keep me in Congress for another term.** **[If you can, please contribute a grassroots donation to help me stand up to guys like George Santos and fight for science solutions for IL-17.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFmRdCkZj2O6tQdcZT3AJbV3A0eavctnQWDTG7EMgboSplQzxO9Y3nUBPTxVb0iKB26xgT7OJSWy5itBfdXqH4h9tpygDZD1pWXj5rdpao_oxncJdM5FBnJ8u-gifQrRceOBHG-Z42HMPT9StDFE4jxnN-Xesd64WorCYliB5UiAM17tSRhW1B_msdenyL32wBS1eacewVINbRI6vuDpAx4akUlWNfFYAlezn3Gpt8DMYVDSbKoWrmV3UyFkTv0HAvNv2wgwiKzQ4pausn-M_BwBYh4Jf9xD-ZW2X3gLytcJ2v1QUvaQLxOvvp2aw4B18_-HUqq6Jko78EZUhSMoBil19HXIfen9DgxGiUOfTALZPvqqu4WMmrhrjNdCO8miN4Q/3tg/6xR4OCC0Tie-XmcT7Jdgzg/h3/kv0m28PY164LAIWraw6auCyNz5WEqI4YshgKle_FT1E)**

| | | Senator Rob Ortt Calls On Legislature To Increase Funding For Dwyer Program and Make It Permanent
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y4tGfeYBBjGVL2KJi9VaHV2_LvZOkkzoe19NFfY2XGX7m5qOa1cjimNv6Eiae6vz-faThboNcQphicTQV1xhB5MPMnn4tjOqnppGdhB8Sz7sRUhhmproQpJhDR6cuPB8iiaywO0S52po5vBbczF5MLMnyGgDkw_0Bf1So0w8Gi6I86yxlfNDjcqjvo5M7nqUGxBpUgsiG8MtNpTyto8WC7t8Tk0H-5IXWGP1LUEpflHovSYm2rsyNvKPtQ-vRkAFyFiGCIm7mKEEAbZgFQL805kotwISE5bv&c=GxJiZSuJ1xW3tnWPmopZCeOf9DUcD8pSPnvFSIACDOKtCxUBAlgvKg==&ch=Be8IhouE8X0Ez0oU0nH-j_yiGZfKshNPHjMI-QZmbWR0sG7S5lVtgQ==)
---
"We are standing here with our brothers and sisters who fought for the freedoms we enjoy today in this country to call on my colleagues across the aisle to do what is right for our heroes and not only increase funding for the Dwyer program, but to make the funding permanent. The Dwyer program provides essential - and at times life-saving - services to veterans in every region of our state. We hear talk all the time in the Legislature about setting priorities. There should be no higher priority than caring for those who put their lives on the line to protect ours, and this budget needs to reflect that reality," said Leader Ortt.
Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt, along with Veterans' One-Stop Center Director of Veteran Integration and PFC Joseph P Dwyer Veteran Peer Support Manager Dan Arnold and Niagara County Veteran Services Coordinator Jeff Glatz today called on the State Legislature to double the funding for the Joseph P. Dwyer Peer-to-Peer Support Program in the 2024 State Budget, and to make the funding stream for the program permanent.
---

Senator Ortt joins Susan and Brian on WBEN NewsRadio to discuss the Governors RECORD BREAKING budget plan. Instead of presenting solutions to make New York more affordable, this budget adds billions of dollars in new spending and imposes a new payroll tax that will hurt downstate New York businesses. New York needs a rescue plan - this isn't it.

| ALBANY - Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and Senators Dean Murray and Jack Martins penned a letter calling upon Governor Kathy Hochul to include support for our small businesses in the Executive Budget. The success of our businesses throughout the state is a critical component to our state thriving economically. "I stand with my Senate Republican colleagues in calling on Governor Hochul to include critically important support for our small businesses in the Executive budget," Ortt said. "The Covid-19 pandemic caused a great deal of harm to small businesses which are the backbone of our economy. Small business owners and their employees should not be held as bargaining chips to be traded behind closed doors. They must have the unequivocal support of Albany."
---

clean_body: Sunday, February 5th Edition | | | | == | Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media: | == == == | Weekly Newsletter | February 5th, 2023 | Issue XLVIII | | | | | Senator Rob Ortt Calls On Legislature To Increase Funding For Dwyer Program and Make It Permanent == "We are standing here with our brothers and sisters who fought for the freedoms we enjoy today in this country to call on my colleagues across the aisle to do what is right for our heroes and not only increase funding for the Dwyer program, but to make the funding permanent. The Dwyer program provides essential - and at times life-saving - services to veterans in every region of our state. We hear talk all the time in the Legislature about setting priorities. There should be no higher priority than caring for those who put their lives on the line to protect ours, and this budget needs to reflect that reality," said Leader Ortt. Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt, along with Veterans' One-Stop Center Director of Veteran Integration and PFC Joseph P Dwyer Veteran Peer Support Manager Dan Arnold and Niagara County Veteran Services Coordinator Jeff Glatz today called on the State Legislature to double the funding for the Joseph P. Dwyer Peer-to-Peer Support Program in the 2024 State Budget, and to make the funding stream for the program permanent. | == | | | In The News: | | | == ---|--- | Thoughts on Governor's Budget plan - State Senate Minority Leader Rob Ortt Senator Ortt joins Susan and Brian on WBEN NewsRadio to discuss the Governors RECORD BREAKING budget plan. name: NDRC HQ
subject: a message from Attorney General Eric Holder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
there’s good news and bad news
|
---

Team, we have good news and bad news about our fight to end gerrymandering and secure fair maps across the country.

**First, the good news: Thanks to our work, our maps are the fairest they’ve been in _decades_.** Ahead of the 2022 elections, _The New York Times_ called the House maps the fairest in 40 years. As a result, Democrats were able to win tough races in key states and block the predicted “red wave.”

**Now, the bad news: Across the country, too many maps are _still_ gerrymandered.** In states like Alabama, Florida, Georgia, and Texas, manipulated maps helped Republicans pick up extra House seats. Considering that the GOP only won the House majority by five votes, those gerrymandered districts had a _huge_ impact.

**But there’s more good news, team: The NDRC is CONTINUING our fight to end gerrymandering – and it’s not too late to get involved!** | [Support the NDRC’s fight for fair maps: Donate Now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58303094/390674179/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230205_FR_2C_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlM2E3MjI5LTZlYTUtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aEHYvjle8hcc6o0HL83Sz-2UJzuXFwl-MRWpfodIOL4=)
---
While we’ve made incredible progress, we’re reminded of what A.G. Eric Holder said: **“Now is not the time to take our democracy for granted.”** He’s right – and that’s why we must keep fighting.

**Right now the NDRC is continuing our efforts to mobilize communities so we can replace gerrymandered maps with fair districts and hand power back to voters.**
**This grassroots movement helped us achieve big things ahead of the 2022 elections.[Will you pitch in now to help us get even more done ahead of 2024 so we can help Democrats compete on fair maps across the country?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58303096/390674184/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230205_FR_2C_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlM2E3MjI5LTZlYTUtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aEHYvjle8hcc6o0HL83Sz-2UJzuXFwl-MRWpfodIOL4=)**

clean_body: there’s good news and bad news | Team, we have good news and bad news about our fight to end gerrymandering and secure fair maps across the country. First, the good news: Thanks to our work, our maps are the fairest they’ve been in decades. Ahead of the 2022 elections, The New York Times called the House maps the fairest in 40 years. As a result, Democrats were able to win tough races in key states and block the predicted “red wave.” Now, the bad news: Across the country, too many maps are still gerrymandered. In states like Alabama, Florida, Georgia, and Texas, manipulated maps helped Republicans pick up extra House seats. Considering that the GOP only won the House majority by five votes, those gerrymandered districts had a huge impact. But there’s more good news, team: The NDRC is CONTINUING our fight to end gerrymandering – and it’s not too late to get involved! | = While we’ve made incredible progress, we’re reminded of what A.G. Eric Holder said: “Now is not the time to take our democracy for granted.” He’s right – and that’s why we must keep fighting. Right now the NDRC is continuing our efforts to mobilize communities so we can replace gerrymandered maps with fair districts and hand power back to voters. This grassroots movement helped us achieve big things ahead of the 2022 elections.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b52f25e551744069f006a18146abb62&_e=l02vF3N-_jf8vkwG03F4exgEiAlN1EwdzrDDtL7eefATJziosWdnw1IoFgmnRgXCH8OlYUhjOz2usM2T_7g_qErKBhVIjbmj3NVKpNm4cxZit3eWu4ZLj2g7-rPGbqXC6h3a_Ay36JNWHStf-m0RKj2-miSnmQYKxjG0CZZskcExwkTug9watGi_61uLdDAz8Vr6umet0-FnSEfjRdVeJMSFPT8zKosagFCkDXoVqxHP3KcjAmm8SRNm7tRbF5eyRGAGlnMF4ei9IN9vzrqznYNB39Y8LK1AcsM7KmHf0SM%3D)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b52f25e551744069f006a18146abb62&_e=l02vF3N-_jf8vkwG03F4exgEiAlN1EwdzrDDtL7eefATJziosWdnw1IoFgmnRgXCH8OlYUhjOz2usM2T_7g_qErKBhVIjbmj3NVKpNm4cxZit3eWu4ZLj2g7-rPGbqXC6h3a_Ay36JNWHStf-m0RKhzogCuAldDgcNl248SB2bIxEY3f-u3VUxGzGD9ZdU0dvtrGZ1O2i11iNzgO-JI8qSbzZgdOoh2hWtBJGRMgrhQK6f7BpG4VFcSyAVxZ3xYdgtRZvI-HNGYsxGA7mPkFje15ShOfRX0TcEnr0nbp3Qo%3D)**

Friend,

As we look to the future of our country, we need strong and proven leaders who are ready to defend our values and protect our country.

That’s why I’m making a special announcement on February 15. Before I make my announcement, I am asking for you to join me in this fight for our nation’s future. **[Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5bcdf62ad3ed45eb8eec4ca252687a97&_e=ZJ_KfJR8-Nf5Vl_0hI1Y3t_d1VlDVBKqrCvqEIocRM6Aqs5GoLfYZHSiD_83vSGssy67SBUGLpFPft9x1I0t4ejP9hoLtpATT9yNrYkxeaeFFgRneqpzE8rFUo08nTuFWLbNli49NNyw8_n1Z5FMEROIz-D3bjBcoq-GLQvu91FapKsbJ9GS5S2l--yXL4ydW9Z07lp1-iOn6SUm-Mwce8-ymtRt8zn1LGbb6DBtcmo1BuxsyrDEH2-Z6GuPiJvg4XYge0r5gr4SfcFMxq_sbjaEEeC5kWA2oQI-g-ZAvj7Q_u29yQtlXscf_uZwxJMPyZyKv_xq3A5r25vOoKmiaueHHrb9MaoLfebO9wi5GjRGKeWy1WBDZMBkw7EUzNs2n3zizmbhHaWSWXFKl9Oym_WH7fStT5cjr1_3R7RJNsCnuU2okm575kWjfIhuH9yDKtJ8AhR9bMOqvGHGtVvS3bLHxvEexGcKvm_u5cUjKoiBydkCrg9LbqeyhH7SWG-cvk87o5N7g3sFeynCtVpcxO9ApuDymAYNh53FaZ6Ochh6hD-47kAdEELKOCSd7moZNDWtRhmc790FFIF73u88kZ6zYDatYOqR0l-C6oZIEIHmIutKXntdxURKTr6vm8AM "Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.")**

---
| | [Chip in Here](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5bcdf62ad3ed45eb8eec4ca252687a97&_e=ZJ_KfJR8-Nf5Vl_0hI1Y3t_d1VlDVBKqrCvqEIocRM6Aqs5GoLfYZHSiD_83vSGssy67SBUGLpFPft9x1I0t4ejP9hoLtpATT9yNrYkxeaeFFgRneqpzE8rFUo08nTuFWLbNli49NNyw8_n1Z5FMEROIz-D3bjBcoq-GLQvu91FapKsbJ9GS5S2l--yXL4ydW9Z07lp1-iOn6SUm-Mwce8-ymtRt8zn1LGbb6DBtcmo1BuxsyrDEH2-Z6GuPiJvg4XYge0r5gr4SfcFMxq_sbjaEEeC5kWA2oQI-g-ZAvj7Q_u29yQtlXscf_uZwxJMPyZyKv_xq3A5r25vOoKmiaueHHrb9MaoLfebO9wi5GjRGKeWy1WBDZMBkw7EUzNs2n3zizmbhHaWSWXFKl9Oym_WH7fStT5cjr1_3R7RJNsCnuU2okm575kWjfIhuH9yDKtJ8AhR9bMOqvGHGtVvS3bLHxvEexGcKvm_u5cUjKojFsoOjblE5FovYlveWTgacAH-NQQREU5To45YLnDIz7MauvBAPPJxGnfcdDeb7WWVc0oHiU_QHZX4fp6w5VL7CBM7VSp6UMqE_FP49NiSsCk9Fb6UvTZKVkWjXrdNhg1xwv6BETD_EefGLNRxM1ojt)
---

I am proud to stand for the ideals that make our nation the greatest force for good in human history. I will never waver in this commitment—not now, not ever. I will always stand for America.

**[Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5bcdf62ad3ed45eb8eec4ca252687a97&_e=ZJ_KfJR8-Nf5Vl_0hI1Y3t_d1VlDVBKqrCvqEIocRM6Aqs5GoLfYZHSiD_83vSGssy67SBUGLpFPft9x1I0t4ejP9hoLtpATT9yNrYkxeaeFFgRneqpzE8rFUo08nTuFWLbNli49NNyw8_n1Z5FMEROIz-D3bjBcoq-GLQvu91FapKsbJ9GS5S2l--yXL4ydW9Z07lp1-iOn6SUm-Mwce8-ymtRt8zn1LGbb6DBtcmo1BuxsyrDEH2-Z6GuPiJvg4XYge0r5gr4SfcFMxq_sbjaEEeC5kWA2oQI-g-ZAvj7Q_u29yQtlXscf_uZwxJMPyZyKv_xq3A5r25vOoKmiaueHHrb9MaoLfebO9wi5GjRGKeWy1WBDZMBkw7EUzNs2n3zizmbhHaWSWXFKl9Oym_WH7fStT5cjr1_3R7RJNsCnuU2okm575kWjfIhuH9yDKtJ8AhR9bMOqvGHGtVvS3bLHxvEexGcKvm_u5cUjKoi3YEwOmfk5emORLLgDH2YCe6l4FUSbfUbSbRRO0sF11UrCPdHXX_zgapdkt7HJLodWBSYWIHZYVF3Wn5DzjRwXuDMKl2rErXZreQlR7yf0dBsMei24cJwQ8dLRokNxIpXC9JMEZQe3G9ffm4gpECYZ "Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.")**

Thank you for your continued support.

---
My very best,

name: Susie Lee
subject: We have to keep pushing forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58325284/390709592/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230205_FR_EOMTY_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTRjOTUyNC05YmE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GoVRWfAmThG_g_gChmkq5B7p0HsXiO_K4FBBvU_BgIc=) I have good news, folks: **Thanks to your support, we were able to reach our end-of-month goal for January!** This is a big win for us, and it means that we can continue pushing forward in our fight to keep NV-03 blue and take on the GOP House Majority. I know that having to continue our efforts post-election has been a little tiring. _But look, you can trust me when I say that Kevin McCarthy and his billionaire backers aren’t planning on backing down._ Republicans are pulling in cash from MAGA super PACs in preparation to support far-right candidates who will run in top-targeted districts like mine. They desperately want to flip NV-03 red and add to their majority. But I’m proudly running a grassroots, people-powered campaign because I believe the only interests running Congress should be the voices of hardworking families. That’s why I’m counting on as many of my supporters as possible to chip in. **Big or small, every contribution helps in the fight to take on Kevin McCarthy and hold this seat blue.** [**I’m asking personally — Will you stay committed in this fight by chipping in to help my campaign stand toe-to-toe to Kevin McCarthy’s warchest?
