clean_body: | | | = I have good news, folks: Thanks to your support, we were able to reach our end-of-month goal for January! This is a big win for us, and it means that we can continue pushing forward in our fight to keep NV-03 blue and take on the GOP House Majority. I know that having to continue our efforts post-election has been a little tiring. But look, you can trust me when I say that Kevin McCarthy and his billionaire backers aren’t planning on backing down. Republicans are pulling in cash from MAGA super PACs in preparation to support far-right candidates who will run in top-targeted districts like mine. They desperately want to flip NV-03 red and add to their majority. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: 3 weeks to another House seat for Democrats? We have a good chance in Jennifer McClellan’s special election race in Virginia.
body:
Feb. 21 House election in Virginia
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf07fbdf8-d223-4875-8e5e-9a4572a773ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_IN LESS THAN THREE WEEKS, ON FEBRUARY 21ST:_ [We can shrink the GOP House Majority THIS MONTH and make Kevin McCarthy suffer by electing Jennifer McClellan in Virginia!!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f842687-8494-4459-af77-ce3a8d4425f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Have you gotten a chance to help Jennifer McClellan win this special election race yet? **[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd10f7af-6f0d-46d4-8039-2eed9c1e2ff1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _It's been painful watching the clown show in Congress, led by Weaker (as I like to call him) McCarthy. He's brought chaos, stupidity and incompetence to the House, and endangered us by putting Marjorie Taylor Greene on the Homeland Security Committee._ _Yet, his weakness is opportunity._ _House Republicans have one of the smallest majorities ever and we can shrink it further. There's an open seat in Virginia, sadly, vacated when Rep. Donald McEachin passed away in November. **Progressive Democrat Jennifer McClellan is running for it, and the election's only weeks away!**_** ** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in making history and adding another Democrat to the House? Can you please give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can elect Democrat Jennifer McClellan to Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb29a9c9f-5ee9-4e98-9ae3-5e3667a9a271/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Yes, it's a Democratic seat. Yet, so was George Santos' seat. We MUST NEVER take anything for granted. **
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te2b6547f-aa49-4346-97a0-6b40c951e466/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_McClellan would be the first Black woman elected to the House from this district. __She has a long history of civil rights activism and was elected to the state assembly, then state senate, where now she serves. This Includes her role as Vice-Chair of the Virginia Legislative Black Caucus._** _McClellan's opponent is a MAGA nut who attacked our democracy and endangered election workers by claiming the 2020 election was stolen. He would ban abortion and eliminate all gun laws._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in making history and adding another Democrat to the House? Can you please give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can elect Democrat Jennifer McClellan to Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4ddda08-84da-4d32-81c9-c8d8f9737358/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping Democrats thrive, passing progressive policy and increasing Kevin McCarthy's suffering as he manages an even smaller caucus._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28b883db-e0dc-4e22-9ace-275133f481f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/jennifermcclellan-vahouserace8-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2facb430-6ba8-4ab1-b261-8571a22e3f9c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

**Life is Beautiful**
---
---
---
---
**The 5th annual Virginia March For Life brought hundreds of pro-life advocates to Capitol Square on Wednesday. Attorney General Miyares had the honor of speaking before the march began where he highlighted the compassionate work Pregnancy Center charities do in the face of adversary.**** **
---
| |
---
|
---
| | **Southwest Virginia Comes to Richmond**** **
---
---
---
**_Attorney General Miyares enjoyed welcoming Southwest Virginia leaders to Richmond yesterday. It’s always a good day when SWVA comes to town!_**
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
---
**On Thursday, Attorney General Miyares announced the successful prosecution of a Richmond man for possession of child pornography. After being found guilty by a jury, the Richmond City Circuit Court sentenced the man to a total of 10 years in prison.**** ** _“Upholding Virginia law and protecting our children is one of my office’s most important responsibilities. I’m proud of our collaboration with local law enforcement to ensure justice was served.”_ **– Attorney General Miyares **

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The GOP's Agenda: anti-American, Anti-Freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We can't be surprised by the extremist agenda Republicans are pushing.
#
Peter,
Republicans have continued to show us who they really are and where their priorities lie — not with the American people, but with their ultra-rich donors at the expense of the rest of us.
Instead of working on behalf of the people who elected them, Republicans have chosen to continue amplifying so-called culture wars and pushing an extremist, anti-life, anti-freedom, and anti-American agenda that will hurt communities around the country. Why? The GOP has proven itself to be the party of no — with no real policies or solutions to some of the most pressing issues in our country at this critical moment.
On the other hand, our progressive movement is built on a commitment to advocating and legislating for working people and our communities. We need and deserve more leaders with big ideas, not flamethrowers. [**Will you chip in $3 or any amount today to fight back against the GOP's extremist agenda?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33441?refcode=em20230205-2135&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2135%2E420207%2E65VOKZ)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33441?refcode=em20230205-2135&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2135%2E420207%2E65VOKZ)**
From refusing to address the epidemic of gun violence, seeking to criminalize abortion and reproductive rights, proposing holding the economy hostage to force cuts on Social Security and Medicare and much more, the GOP have shown themselves to be too extreme for Americans. Time and time again, voters have rejected this far-right brand of politics.
Meanwhile, in the past two years, our movement was able to pass the first gun safety legislation in a generation, cut prescription cuts, make the largest climate investments in history, and passed comprehensive infrastructure legislation.
**Our work is far from over.** With Republicans only controlling a small majority in the House, we will not be deterred in our fight for a better, brighter future for all.
Since being elected to Congress, I have pushed for progressive solutions to answer some of the most urgent issues facing our country today. Unlike the GOP, I will continue to push for a **bold progressive agenda that works for everyone —** [**but I can't do this work alone. Can you pitch in $3 or any amount to thwart the GOP's radical agenda?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33441?refcode=em20230205-2135&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2135%2E420207%2E65VOKZ)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33441?refcode=em20230205-2135&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2135%2E420207%2E65VOKZ)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230205-2135-footer&t=23&refcode2=2135_420207_65VOKZ&akid=2135%2E420207%2E65VOKZ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2135%2E420207%2E65VOKZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2135%2E420207%2E65VOKZ)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

| JOIN US TOMORROW NIGHT Monday, February 6 Chesterfield VA Tea Party Meeting

---
| COME JOIN US...this is one educational meeting you don't want to miss!
---
|
---
| |
---
| Featuring Senator Amanda Chase, Senate District 12
---
Senator Chase has served in the Senate for almost 8 years. She has been rated as the most conservative Senator in Virginia. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom and help for our veterans. She will be updating us on her 2023 legislation at this meeting.
[Senator Amanda Chase's website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OT8Ovg-JhPKE5h133b6_4mZUtgWmali4hno7jFQqUZ62JcyWL3qJU_Q7xTCcSHNb-ZhnWltCm0pEBwFfavoWnJwfje62MnS_j-0_DwuDJOy4u-oe1559lJmsZLOd4vQGlek06VgOiRmzRrGf6pZv_g==&c=AcrcrcI1kxb8JcUxi45rmPiIDKJ-zGgI-yL1ItUBxeIhaUvvgbjGYQ==&ch=vL62-XqnJqlScLl4T75KPlYK69LyJPPmJi3UewQSB4ZSTZWU53cZrA==)
---
| Dear Friends, At tomorrow's Chesterfield VA Tea Party meeting you will get a legislative update from Senator Chase, Delegate John McGuire has been invited, Virginians for Safe Technology on Smart Meter and legislation and Virginians for Children First on a number of education bills. You don't want to miss!
Please come sign the petition to get our names on the ballot for the Republican Primary. Unsure of who your legislator is? Please click the button below to find out.
Wednesday is crossover. So all Senate bills must be voted on before Tuesday at midnight. Learn how to use the Virginia General Assembly portal to look up and follow bills, speak before committees, and watch online.
Look forward to seeing you there! For God & Country,
---

---

---
---
Amanda Chase Virginia State Senator since 2016

clean_body: Join us at the Great American Ranch for a Legislative Update | | | | | | == | | | | | | JOIN US TOMORROW NIGHT Monday, February 6 Chesterfield VA Tea Party Meeting | COME JOIN US...this is one educational meeting you don't want to miss! | | | | Featuring Senator Amanda Chase, Senate District 12 Senator Chase has served in the Senate for almost 8 years. She has been rated as the most conservative Senator in Virginia. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom and help for our veterans. She will be updating us on her 2023 legislation at this meeting. == | Dear Friends, At tomorrow's Chesterfield VA Tea Party meeting you will get a legislative update from Senator Chase, Delegate John McGuire has been invited, Virginians for Safe Technology on Smart Meter and legislation and Virginians for Children First on a number of education bills. You don't want to miss! Please come sign the petition to get our names on the ballot for the Republican Primary. Unsure of who your legislator is? Please click the button below to find out. Wednesday is crossover. So all Senate bills must be voted on before Tuesday at midnight. Learn how to use the Virginia General Assembly portal to look up and follow bills, speak before committees, and watch online. Look forward to seeing you there! As you’ll hear in his speech on Tuesday, President Biden has accomplished so much for the American people in these first two years. Since we were sworn in, we’ve created almost 11 million jobs, resulting in one of the lowest unemployment rates in 50 years. We’ve created more small businesses in the last two-year span than any two-year span in history. Thanks to your help, we are hard at work rebuilding our economy from the bottom up and the middle out. We’ve passed critical legislation -- like the _Inflation Reduction Act_ to lower costs for working families and the _Respect for Marriage Act_ to protect Americans’ right to marry who they love. We’ve fought to lower energy and health care costs for working families by capping the cost of insulin and other prescription drugs. But we know that there is still work to be done -- and we cannot do it alone, Derek. **Tuesday is going to be a big night, and President Biden and I need to know you’re by our side before then. President Biden and I are so grateful for your support and we look forward to seeing you recommit to electing Democrats by making a grassroots contribution before Tuesday.** **[Make a $7 donation to the DNC before President Biden delivers his State of the Union address. clean_body: When President Biden addresses the nation on Tuesday and shares his vision for the next two years, I hope you take pride in your role in all that we have accomplished together. | | Derek -- Before President Biden gives his State of the Union address, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain exactly how our team is building a better America and what As you’ll hear in his speech on Tuesday, President Biden has accomplished so much for the American people in these first two years. Since we were sworn in, we’ve created almost 11 million jobs, resulting in one of the lowest unemployment rates in 50 years. We’ve created more small businesses in the last two-year span than any two-year span in history. Thanks to your help, we are hard at work rebuilding our economy from the bottom up and the middle out. We’ve passed critical legislation -- like the Inflation Reduction Act to lower costs for working families and the Respect for Marriage Act to protect Americans’ right to marry who they love. We’ve fought to lower energy and health care costs for working families by capping the cost of insulin and other prescription drugs. But we know that there is still work to be done -- and we cannot do it alone, Derek. Tuesday is going to be a big night, and President Biden and I need to know you’re by our side before then. President Biden and I are so grateful for your support and we look forward to seeing you recommit to electing Democrats by making a grassroots contribution before Tuesday. When President Biden addresses the nation on Tuesday and shares his vision for the next two years, I hope you take pride in your role in all that we have accomplished together. Thank you for being on this team, Derek. Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. subject: I Could’ve Ignored This Email, too.
body:
When I went to my local sports store looking for a bag I could take with me on my trip...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11494/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/48c8d21c695b2f1325918665450ae3fcab20bade). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11494/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/48c8d21c695b2f1325918665450ae3fcab20bade?message_id=ImI2ZDFjMDIwLTg3Y2UtMDEzYi01OTBkLTQyMDEwYTgwMDAzZEB0aGVndW5wZW9wbGUuY29tIg==).

---
---
|
---
When I went to my local sports store looking for a bag I could take with me on my trip... I couldn't believe my eyes. This place had DOZENS of backpacks, sling bags, fanny packs, totes, duffels... The list goes on. Would you be surprised to know I left empty-handed? You see, I was looking for a bag that wasn’t too big, not too small, and **SMART**. I needed to fit as many things in my pack without it being clunky, and it had to fit in the overhead on the plane. All the ones I saw were either too large, or too small, or just didn’t have the pockets and organizational space I needed. So I went home, pretty irritated... I only had 5 days before my flight. I sat on my computer, and did some research... [THANK GOODNESS I DID!](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11494/6374453/3fb104f3e0e7de882ce81798fb8870a5281508a8/48c8d21c695b2f1325918665450ae3fcab20bade) Just as I was about to give up and give in to a mediocre bag I really didn’t want, I came across [THIS ONE.](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11494/6374453/3fb104f3e0e7de882ce81798fb8870a5281508a8/48c8d21c695b2f1325918665450ae3fcab20bade)

[](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11494/6374453/0fe08ef0c121e5f4ed61b67ebec3b8497cd0f52f/48c8d21c695b2f1325918665450ae3fcab20bade)
---
This bag is SO DURABLE. It’s unlike anything I saw at the store. The compartments hold all of my belongings And the straps can make it as compact as needed. Perfect. **[Check it out for yourself.](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11494/6374453/3fb104f3e0e7de882ce81798fb8870a5281508a8/48c8d21c695b2f1325918665450ae3fcab20bade)
** You’ll be glad you did.

clean_body: When I went to my local sports store looking for a bag I could take with me on my trip... | | | Unsubscribe . We'll miss you - so will great opportunities. To view this email as a webpage, click ==. | | | When I went to my local sports store looking for a bag I could take with me on my trip... I couldn't believe my eyes. This place had DOZENS of backpacks, sling bags, fanny packs, totes, duffels... The list goes on. Would you be surprised to know I left empty-handed? You see, I was looking for a bag that wasn’t too big, not too small, and SMART. I needed to fit as many things in my pack without it being clunky, and it had to fit in the overhead on the plane. All the ones I saw were either too large, or too small, or just didn’t have the pockets and organizational space I needed. So I went home, pretty irritated... I only had 5 days before my flight. I sat on my computer, and did some research... Just as I was about to give up and give in to a mediocre bag I really didn’t want, I came across This bag is SO DURABLE. It’s unlike anything I saw at the store. The compartments hold all of my belongings And the straps can make it as compact as needed. Perfect. You’ll be glad you did. | | | | | MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the person or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: here’s why I’m in politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
As Senator, those lessons are what guide my fight on the front lines of issues that Granite Staters care about
| | |
---
_I’ll explain more below, but in the final days of the 2022 election, the GOP spent so much money and polls tightened so much that pundits doubted whether we could win. We did win, but we had to take on some debt to do it.**[Will you please chip in $3 or more right now – before February ends – to help us pay it down?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58305893/390683949/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2201-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzJkZGM4Ni03NmE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgfUr0p6TxpUsOMxVJkVO0-YFRFDm1j7KzyFiiuZuuw=)**_
Hi there,
My son, Ben, experiences severe disabilities. Being Ben’s mom – and his advocate – teaches me every day about the power of inclusion, the importance of an economy that works for everyone, and the need for a society that treats everyone with dignity.
As Senator, those lessons are what guide my fight on the front lines of issues that Granite Staters care about, including restoring abortion access, fighting climate change, and ensuring that everyone has the opportunity to be included in our shared success.
In my 2022 race, it looked for a moment that our fight for those priorities was in jeopardy. Republican spending against me skyrocketed, polls tightened to within a point or two, and our race was dubbed a toss-up. _**Experts thought we could lose.**_
We did win – but my campaign took on some debt in order to do it. We’re working to pay the bills so that I can continue focusing on serving folks like you in the Senate, and I’m hoping that I can count on you to help out:
**[Please rush $3 or whatever you can to help us retire our debt once and for all. My team says we need to raise around $3,500 from this email to stay on track, and your donation would be immensely helpful.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58305896/390683958/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2201-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzJkZGM4Ni03NmE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgfUr0p6TxpUsOMxVJkVO0-YFRFDm1j7KzyFiiuZuuw=)**
Thank you.
With every good wish,

Maggie Hassan
| If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, **[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58305899/390683965/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk2201-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzJkZGM4Ni03NmE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgfUr0p6TxpUsOMxVJkVO0-YFRFDm1j7KzyFiiuZuuw=)**. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58305902/390683968/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk2201-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzJkZGM4Ni03NmE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgfUr0p6TxpUsOMxVJkVO0-YFRFDm1j7KzyFiiuZuuw=) This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58305906/390683972/-2088849429?refcode=mh-jtk2201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzJkZGM4Ni03NmE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgfUr0p6TxpUsOMxVJkVO0-YFRFDm1j7KzyFiiuZuuw=&emci=504fe339-89a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=832ddc86-76a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5452893).

name: BIDEN BORDER ALERT
subject: Cities are COLLAPSING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
It sounds impossible in America:

**Border towns are COLLAPSING because they are being TAKEN OVER by the cartels and illegal immigrants flooding our southern border.**

Lives are in danger, our safety is at risk - and Joe Biden has absolutely NO plan to fix this mess.

_And while Joe Biden sits and does nothing, border crossings are INCREASING._

**It’s time to take action at the border and hold Joe Biden accountable.[Join us today to SECURE THE BORDER and SAVE AMERICA. ](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=45c6475f87324af0993e1ad8721d1436&_e=p04JveZ9plzq3yhIcTHIc6L4CVibL0aIL0VoleKP0kDEp4uD2zfojrAoTny_tL_dTddOev30UCup-zXsVJyx46L7L3CXmb7duBnG3ae2BMhrT-KXm3VQ7EpsA9y4qSkpbSVpXqL-5855K3vEqMQIg7tvwzVWb0qJxK1XygoVMTetRrK6fTF24q_q4wqPotJGGU4QzXB8UDJPj4nKJhB1ZZkkypRppk5IH4yxm6nHWtYaxKPxNCyjthnrN4_8HyMIjrsEGPVfsP7VehD6vSF61AgqWkqVsWpPe6ieWGHXuIzaj71BYjMHKu5F-LfT96bLDF4JC6J0rbR7OD5LPd9myOCf_PvwZg97tGnT9VDGipzULVcoYAmW9EYjZWmdIxcb)**

| | The cartels have completely taken over our border.

And while our border patrol agents are BEGGING for help, the Biden Administration is making it harder to hire agents and give them the critical backup they need.

It’s not a coincidence. The Biden Administration WANTS our borders open.

Republicans are determined to secure our border, but if we’re going to solve this crisis, we need to build our war chest so we have the resources to win.

[**Stand with Republicans and SECURE THE BORDER!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=45c6475f87324af0993e1ad8721d1436&_e=p04JveZ9plzq3yhIcTHIc6L4CVibL0aIL0VoleKP0kDEp4uD2zfojrAoTny_tL_dTddOev30UCup-zXsVJyx46L7L3CXmb7duBnG3ae2BMhrT-KXm3VQ7EpsA9y4qSkpbSVpXqL-5855K3vEqMQIg7tvwzVWb0qJxK1XygoVMTetRrK6fTF24q_q4wqPotJGGU4QzXB8UDJPj4nKJhB1ZZkkypRppk5IH4yxm6nHWtb3XQxgm32CZGmSP0vsqzK1id8bi5TSQ2vXzmOo9MA-B-Wp8J1zttAfjfqvWWmRAFRvTMhpdyw79qs-l-QgK0Hs5NZgiNXYpZZmENcN6Am6Xi3EePx5aFMbTIsaF3MXbIpl55TagDSP-pemIgdgVlRm)

body:

|

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Attorney General Fitch - Take Action NOW!
body:
|
---
| | |
---
|
## PRESS RELEASE
---
| Attorney General Fitch, The National Association of Attorneys General (NAAG) is in the news again, this time because it was caught [investing money from public settlements in ESG investments that “destroy shareholder value in pursuit of faddish ideological aims, often without proper disclosure to investors.”](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/sOpW15859hoaUFgLuS5kzg)You are on the NAAG Executive Committee. But these ESG investments only came to light because your new conservative colleague, Attorney General Kris Kobach of Kansas, [demanded to know what NAAG was doing with the millions it has amassed from public enforcement settlements](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/NykyJYlZitrCeaE3Qbrejw).If NAAG is investing in left-wing ESG campaigns behind your back, what else are they doing without your knowledge? What else is out of your control at NAAG? What else is the left-wing career staff in Washington, D.C. doing in conjunction with NAAG leadership from places like Oregon, New York, and Connecticut?We [warned you before](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/yRv5IG41cAUApKuWzDxzKA) about NAAG, the millions they have amassed that should have gone into the Mississippi General Fund, their leftward drift, and their financial mismanagement. We told you it was time to “quit this left-wing organization and bring home the money sitting at NAAG that belongs in the hands of the Mississippi state government and Magnolia State taxpayers.” Now we find out the situation is worse than we knew.**This time has come for you to act.** **The charade of reforming NAAG from the inside is over. **NAAG has rewarded your continued engagement by deploying our state’s resources into left-wing ESG investments that fly in the face of our values.**** And they have done it right under your nose.**It is time for you to quit NAAG and take legal action to protect our public money.** It is obvious to everyone that the time for legal recourse is coming; it is time for you to stop being on the sidelines, hew to your conservative principles, withdraw from NAAG, and bring our millions home, no matter what it takes.
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/oKB1xdtUORjudqXC44ZAyg) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

body:
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15405?t=6&akid=1676%2E564421%2E3FAeBq) I’ve got some bad news:

In the dead of night, Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party did what they’ve threatened for the last two years.

**They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.**

This is political retribution for my leading the impeachment of Donald Trump, pure and simple, and a dangerous effort to go after anyone who holds them accountable. It also turns the Intelligence Committee into a political plaything for their right-wing supporters.

FOlks, I really need you with me to help respond to this baseless attack on my ability to serve my constituents and the American people.

[**Please, contribute $3 whatever you can spare today to our campaign and Ron Be Gone to help me respond to Republicans’ baseless attacks on my ability to hold them accountable. This isn’t the end of my fight for truth, accountability, and our democracy. In fact, it’s only the start: »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15407?t=8&akid=1676%2E564421%2E3FAeBq) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15413?t=14&akid=1676%2E564421%2E3FAeBq)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15414?t=15&akid=1676%2E564421%2E3FAeBq)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15415?t=16&akid=1676%2E564421%2E3FAeBq)
I’ll have much more to say soon. But for now, thanks for standing with me — because it’s not just a personal attack on me. It’s an attack on accountability and effective oversight.

And it’s up to all of us to fight back.

— Adam
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1676%2E564421%2E3FAeBq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1676%2E564421%2E3FAeBq).**

body:
Can you donate $23 to start 2023? | Do you remember this story? In 2018, New York's state government, run by disgraced former Governor Andrew Cuomo, led a blacklisting campaign against...
We are helping NRA fundraise. Questions? 1(800)662-3888

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286633:J0EEihGNy:m:1:3334294963:5D6AA7BA854382F4834F131DF1C0903D:r)

Peter,

_Do you remember this story?_

In 2018, New York's state government, run by disgraced former Governor Andrew Cuomo, led a **blacklisting campaign** against the NRA, coercing banks and other financial institutions from doing business with us.

A recent opinion piece in **The Wall Street Journal** brought this back to light and broke down just how far Cuomo and his gun-grabbing cronies went to try to shut us down.

Now, the NRA is taking this matter to court. It is UNACCEPTABLE and ILLEGAL for the government to target private institutions because it disagrees with their missions. _In attacking us, New York State was attacking both the FIRST and SECOND AMENDMENTS._
**[HELP US FIGHT BACK»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286633:J0EEihGNy:m:1:3334294963:5D6AA7BA854382F4834F131DF1C0903D:r)**
The state's actions were an obvious First Amendment violation. As the article's authors pointed out, **"[Cuomo's] goal was to punish the NRA for its gun-rights advocacy."**

Not only is that kind of behavior a brazen abuse of power, but it's a rejection of the very freedoms that our country was founded on. We won't stand for it, and we're calling on YOU to help us fight back.

**[Chip in TODAY to do your part to SAVE THE SECOND AMENDMENT and DEFEND FREEDOM.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286633:J0EEihGNy:m:1:3334294963:5D6AA7BA854382F4834F131DF1C0903D:r)**

**[OFFICIAL 2023 DONOR FILE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286633:J0EEihGNy:m:1:3334294963:5D6AA7BA854382F4834F131DF1C0903D:r)**
**SUPPORTER:****Peter**
**CONTRIBUTION STATUS:**_**PENDING**_

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286633:J0EEihGNy:m:1:3334294963:5D6AA7BA854382F4834F131DF1C0903D:r)**

This "$23 for 2023" campaign is the beginning of a HUGE YEAR for the NRA. **In 2023, we will fight back against the censorship mob like never before.**

_**It's all on the line this year. Join our campaign today - and be part of the movement to protect freedom.**_

**[Donate TODAY to reject the woke censorship mob and help the NRA fight for YOUR FREEDOMS.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286633:J0EEihGNy:m:1:3334294963:5D6AA7BA854382F4834F131DF1C0903D:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

2/21 | New Hampshire | HD-Strafford 8
2/21 | Kentucky | SD-19
2/28 | Connecticut | HD-6
2/28 | Connecticut | HD-100
2/28 | Connecticut | HD-148
These special elections could be some of the most important elections state Democrats face in this year. Here’s why:
* In Pennsylvania, state Democrats are facing **three must-win elections** on February 7th. Without these three seats, Democrats don’t have a chance of winning chamber control this year.
* In New Hampshire, we’re only _four seats away from a majority_ , so winning the seat on February 21st would help state Democrats gain serious ground. In 2021 we had five special elections in this chamber, so if we can raise the funds to invest in these critical races, we could FLIP the chamber in an odd year!

Special elections like these could change the game for Democrats, but we're up against a tougher fight than usual: **Because these races are so consequential, they’re more expensive than ever – in fact, we're anticipating these races in Pennsylvania will cost 25% more! Republicans outraised us, dumping six figures into January’s elections, and are ready to pour whatever resources they need to win these races after historic losses in November.**
[We can't afford to keep pace with GOP spending in these races without you. Can you rush $7 to push state Democrats to the finish line in elections like these?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zPxM5q-4kK8uu6lZcSOahKj7sxjMS7xBDkwcMIRCFdjZZYbrU0Tmc5YPRHGLcSYNfyusGKbYnzdUb7tH0I-8C-0Pjop-k3IT_E529HOF_qqoZjNKO2xakAiMjzjfqHwzT8JiOW-dNyDejf8dy8sJHiGZ-N_9ivWNmTkMGWl3lHRF2_Iwpo4TD9xo4_1l0tahqtk7T3AnIHLcd23qp8wfNXJqUiuZbyWranRC1IBb4go20Dru82iGzQOaLK6OSkGcOQoZzlE-hp5jEMrS7bgbaYNVTj6sIhPVoRN7KTXedr-jPohxfhwbcNlZZhAEdlrrYNWBP7XUjrmjIyeOz1eynszHeMK3XM4enAscE2PLPMkA4sx6AMfnt64HsjOU7iEbqA3-YDUJj7Xz9Dm_Zy6W81/3tg/esoYOoO5R-yJsaWLcPDGzA/h1/LW1y_RRP0NKV_GHMRWTbxNnhXW19Ofoq17bXslsBI8Y)

name: Team Cori
subject: What’s your favorite song?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We want to hear your favorite ways to celebrate Black joy, including books, songs, movies, and Black-owned businesses.
#
Peter,
Black people built this country. Throughout history, Black leaders have turned the tides of our country, and every day we see examples of Black history makers who continue to do just that.
From the organizers who marched on the Ferguson frontline to save Black lives and sent a message that our lives matter. To government leaders who are working to transform our politics and enact legislation to address the harm that centuries of racist policies have caused. And, leaders like Cori — the first Black woman elected to represent Missouri in Congress — who are advocating for the bold, anti-racist policies St. Louis and communities like it need.
We know that Black history is being made day-in and day-out — and it deserves to be celebrated every single day.
Which is why, in the name of honoring Black history and celebrating Black joy, Cori and our team wants to hear from you:
[**What do you think of when you think of Black joy? What are your favorite books, movies, songs, artists, or businesses that help you celebrate Black joy?**](https://act.coribush.org/survey/email-black-joy/?source=em20230205-2129&t=1&akid=2129%2E1082990%2EUSQyu6)
**[SHARE »](https://act.coribush.org/survey/email-black-joy/?source=em20230205-2129&t=2&akid=2129%2E1082990%2EUSQyu6)**
Throughout the month we’ll share your recommendations and some of Cori’s favorite ways to celebrate Black joy. But in order to do so, we need to hear from you, Peter!
**[So please, share how you celebrate Black joy here.](https://act.coribush.org/survey/email-black-joy/?source=em20230205-2129&t=3&akid=2129%2E1082990%2EUSQyu6)** Then, forward this email to three of your friends so they can share their recommendations with us, too.
Thanks for your help,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230203?refcode=em20230205-2129-footer&t=4&refcode2=2129_1082990_USQyu6&akid=2129%2E1082990%2EUSQyu6) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

name: HER Time
subject: re: the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58309177/390694116/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDFmNWZmZDMtODJhNS1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PgpTNuZ3tmtH-nKfPw9rScnOsdrFaMgcKIfvTNeG560=)
---
We’re never going to see any meaningful gun violence prevention legislation in this country until the NRA releases its chokehold on Republican politicians, Peter. Right now, the NRA and other special interest groups won’t allow any new gun violence prevention laws to even be considered — and they get away with it by funding Republicans’ campaign war chests. For too long, our country and our laws have been decided by the wealthy and the powerful — but that’s not the way it should be. We need to get dark money out of politics, but more urgently, we need to elect more members of Congress who are not beholden to the NRA or other shady special interest groups who want to put profits over people. | | Greetings. Between 1933 and 1981, both parties had a shared vision to invest in hardworking, everyday, ordinary Americans. Back then, Congress based its disputes on which policies would achieve success and the limits in which they would be effective, not whether the policies should exist. Today, the story is different. We have to invest in ourselves, and the federal government has a role in making this possible. We need to:
* Modernize our infrastructure.
* Attract businesses and advance the status of workers.
* Bring supply chains back home.
* Protect our civil rights and our environment.
* Resume our investment in the future. (Scientific research and development is currently 0.7% of the GDP compared to 2% in the past.)
* Protect and pay vital services such as Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security.
* Provide for our national security.

Beyond investigations into investigations and culture wars, we must remember America's promise to hardworking, ordinary people. We remain the land of opportunity. Our communities — even if small and rural — still must progress, thrive, and become an example for the world that empowers the next generation to lead humanity forward. As we address our national debt and deficit spending, we must also consider our revenue. Out of the estimated fiscal budget of $5.8 trillion for 2023, it's unlikely we will find $1.2 trillion of wasteful spending to balance the budget. The wealthiest people in America today [are paying an average of 3%](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/12OOYfS1V/c?w=bDICkSgZEJ8-y_uEZ5-ExxQIrWdRU25My2f5DGePcYg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wcm9qZWN0cy5wcm9wdWJsaWNhLm9yZy9hbWVyaWNhcy1oaWdoZXN0LWluY29tZXMtYW5kLXRheGVzLXJldmVhbGVkLyIsInIiOiJkYTc1MmUxZC05ZWFkLTQxNTMtYjBlYi0wZWUwNzQxNDdmMDYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ), but during the Republican administration of Eisenhower, the top marginal income bracket was 90%. Asking for 15% is more than reasonable. The overwhelming majority of Americans support investment spending for ordinary Americans, but Congress must commit. Our investments today will determine what America looks like for our grandchildren and their children. The time is now. Let's work together with the same vision both political parties saw in the past. Help me fight for initiatives like reasonable tax-fairness with a [contribution to our Rural Fund.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/12OOYfS1V/c?w=71c4LjSttqBFRjfUHU3IdMTtlLTFI8E0R-MoQcBicmU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3RibHVlLmNvbS9kb25hdGUvcnVyYWxmdW5kIiwiciI6ImRhNzUyZTFkLTllYWQtNDE1My1iMGViLTBlZTA3NDE0N2YwNiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) -Dr. Bob Bob LorinserCandidate for US CongressMichigan's 1st Congressional DistrictNorthern Michigan & the Upper PeninsulaVoteDrBob.com

**Now:** _In his latest stunt, McCarthy has officially ousted Rep. Ilhan Omar from the Foreign Affairs committee._
**McCarthy is punishing Dems like Eric and Ilhan for seeking truth, justice, and accountability from the Trump administration and his enablers.**
This is hypocrisy and vengeance, pure and simple. **MAGA extremists stand behind their own, each and every time, and make sure we know it by taking down every single Representative that dares to take a stand against their agenda of fear and hate.**
**This is a travesty.** We need to fight back against the GOP’s anti-Democratic, targeted agenda. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on an urgent matter.
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=541402a3e2734cdab700bd98af3ff106&_e=ASQMyrwFVtNjg4bR23NnG2AFfA7sLoB-2_K97SSs-BaukH3EjGWoUNGKOt2_Rnw8l6EXiHkXzCgSeeV2NTQb8kMfeX7VTQNAcKvdk9wjXqCwqbWcHDe3jliP_FTyc1QfU6LmPQVbnG2I4qpHL3WtlBNKKMH1VmkEbAXdymUGk0UY4jOV6Qz0PB_VSYiIZPFZb7vEHuSBKBg4GRpzFjYQ2v13pHsoaKNpiJf1wdveAOV4S_jHPhI-47CMmU4vjPqVSy0ZQ9IGEwihcKFw_cyDbYQPJ1f-jKy5c3v6Hpt89P-okl9Zy4L-MyPk41J-AOoUGmtD1K3-OSuazYhshMldim9_SgRWu2oyMTbefS2PMrIGJHyzotT4ZAALc8v9_rCUTGup1KvZUzWfKU74LlfMxA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=541402a3e2734cdab700bd98af3ff106&_e=ASQMyrwFVtNjg4bR23NnG2AFfA7sLoB-2_K97SSs-BaukH3EjGWoUNGKOt2_Rnw8l6EXiHkXzCgSeeV2NTQb8kMfeX7VTQNAcKvdk9wjXqCwqbWcHDe3jliP_FTyc1QfU6LmPQVbnG2I4qpHL3WtlBNKKMH1VmkEbAXdymUGk0UY4jOV6Qz0PB_VSYiIZPFZb7vEHuSBKBg4GRpzFjYQ2v13pHsoaKNpiJf1wdveAOUyj4rJfWCLIWtbiox62F52wqpues2jnjXjHb4es9oKXY9d0UspqHgK5PmqzNq4jSqe2_pP3O2L-dId3zxhvj34w-0C6muJ0qV4wBo6tFKr5Ami4YJalciQOkypCm7O5hlrCLFoOIKJA_lZokjxmcp5oErB6peimDQDpJBasw2vzw%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=541402a3e2734cdab700bd98af3ff106&_e=ASQMyrwFVtNjg4bR23NnG2AFfA7sLoB-2_K97SSs-BaukH3EjGWoUNGKOt2_Rnw8l6EXiHkXzCgSeeV2NTQb8kMfeX7VTQNAcKvdk9wjXqCwqbWcHDe3jliP_FTyc1QfU6LmPQVbnG2I4qpHL3WtlBNKKMH1VmkEbAXdymUGk0UY4jOV6Qz0PB_VSYiIZPFZb7vEHuSBKBg4GRpzFjYQ2v13pHsoaKNpiJf1wdveAOWgorc3-_DriZymCiyRKUxaAdhyqAN4iCo4uf0S0aUFjtkiqPMkh8Aq9YZdfP1QrU8xv-B-9tZ5nyMnWGv_UBlkcyvSimlcQcN3Ot4OBRt10V26z3mV3vP8c56msEdiASo1ZCeQqiY4cG1WLNpLIab3hn9i55iyzB02v2yaUfikSA%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Troubling Reports From the Border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
Liberals lie about little things and they lie about big things. | | |
---
| | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=46f5acd11413492280f90f94006347d4&_e=afHEFLGu-A0GY-t57Pyab1Fo3mibfqtPkuPV7rSMQLwR8-7v_gKhtPNYih-oqwyAsSWCOSNItiBc4B7AgS921wwi-__Ve05TBtgJeB2r748-FBdaJYPxg0wDRCJpQckqnlAeP2Iraq-ZMw8OXXo2XovTOkqxkaQx8Yvz0IiEsGwlaAswNtyucSEBKxP-Cv3sgvroidZQwFIKDXueEg3BAUHZWSTMIjVGmmrXM1AhCAZVs9xIxdSPrhiB4HUicw4KZXa6VFWNqi9PkEL1ArS0WPstlpdftAgXu4F7Gc1MdOh633VJ3Q0PN-bWR1yJxS4K8vGDKdp-_my2S4FWGaE7WDrJJELrlKaoa6B4UvSqmIHfto1MWFwfQsnufgK3U1wWthu8IcwmbwAknUB4ZJyVBQ%3D%3D)
---
Every day, there is more news from our southern border, and none of it is good. From record captures to record _getaways,_ Biden’s Border Crisis continues to spiral out of control. Can you imagine a headline worse than this?
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=46f5acd11413492280f90f94006347d4&_e=afHEFLGu-A0GY-t57Pyab1Fo3mibfqtPkuPV7rSMQLwR8-7v_gKhtPNYih-oqwyAsSWCOSNItiBc4B7AgS921wwi-__Ve05TBtgJeB2r748-FBdaJYPxg0wDRCJpQckqnlAeP2Iraq-ZMw8OXXo2XovTOkqxkaQx8Yvz0IiEsGwlaAswNtyucSEBKxP-Cv3sgvroidZQwFIKDXueEg3BAUHZWSTMIjVGmmrXM1AhCAaGW8M1ovq8JVYlakwPrI28CJMClQYAyfH16e9wCX-uWV2aTYbejm3z7NymCLN8yprjvkDD0EfJnWGJlESmga2wjRPoqgqzqzY-SycGo6Q0iJ01G4s0FVn80vOJW3CZjzAkMlfrNmBQyt8xi9xywO7gID2slSGu_vxLboFZOeZZJA%3D%3D)
---
The Biden administration’s border _policy_ is recklessly endangering American lives. It shouldn’t take an atrocity at the hands of a terrorist or sex offender to serve as a wake-up — we know this evil is already HERE! It’s time to take action and once and for all SECURE THE SOUTHERN BORDER.

[**_If you agree that an open border is dangerous and action must be taken against the irresponsible, enabling policies of D.C. democrats, consider donating to my campaign >>> HERE._**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=46f5acd11413492280f90f94006347d4&_e=afHEFLGu-A0GY-t57Pyab1Fo3mibfqtPkuPV7rSMQLwR8-7v_gKhtPNYih-oqwyAsSWCOSNItiBc4B7AgS921wwi-__Ve05TBtgJeB2r748-FBdaJYPxg0wDRCJpQckqnlAeP2Iraq-ZMw8OXXo2XovTOkqxkaQx8Yvz0IiEsGwlaAswNtyucSEBKxP-Cv3sgvroidZQwFIKDXueEg3BAUHZWSTMIjVGmmrXM1AhCAaq7X3JM9NIcG0Rtz3SKP_xY0omW3_xPk5ZqDxVff74QL2jYQBoSujax5XoMQRyxHQGmKkoL6H3m3wAA8JKEcoLgT-7HdWnYfKjpzQ1fL50-azic-GGVcrbDWS-HRoYaMyxi3mByAXQ4FuUgVEqRxK6THKDvY-IYRbdhIasyFG-bQ%3D%3D)
---
We’re in this together,
Senator Josh Hawley
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: tomorrow at 1:30pm (RE: my vax/CPS bill)
body:
|
---
| | I'll keep this short and sweet...

I'm presenting my Vaccine/CPS bill tomorrow (Monday, Feb 6th) at 1:30 pm MST...

_**This bill does one simple thing**_ :

It amends and adds to existing law to prohibit a child protection investigation based on a child's immunization status and to provide that a court shall not grant an order terminating a parent and child relationship based on a child's immunization status.

You can REGISTER to testify in support of this bill (you can show up in person or via video) and/or see the LIVESTREAM link here:

[https://legislature.idaho.gov/wp-content/uploads/sessioninfo/2023/standingcommittees/230206_sj&r_0130PM-Agenda.pdf ](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=7605506f32&e=dea908e0fe "Watch LIVE and/or sign up to testify")

Please share!

_**Idaho needs this**_**. **

Cheers,

Brian

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=f670f9475a).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) Want to support the cause? [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=bf229163a2&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight").

The State of the Union is a time to recognize the progress we’ve made in recent years: Investments in our roads, bridges, and other infrastructure. Hundreds of thousands of jobs added and unemployment at a record 50-year low. Thousands of manufacturing jobs coming to Ohio. Lower prescription drug and energy costs. The SOTU is also an opportunity to look ahead at the work that we still have ahead of us: Reducing gun violence in our communities. Protecting essential programs for working Americans like Social Security and Medicare. Strengthening workers’ rights to join a union and bargain for better wages, benefits, and conditions. [_**We’re building historic progress and we’re not done yet. Sherrod wants to hear which issues you want President Biden to talk about in his State of the Union address.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58325153/390709214/-1720534605?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzkxZDllOC05OGE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=usIR3PpkoY3svH2u6SY7Swn1qS9rJQVSx8AQu7HbuOQ=&emci=5c7a574f-e3a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=3391d9e8-98a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)

clean_body: Tell us which issues you want to hear President Biden address. >> | | | | | President Biden will give his State of the Union address this week. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The State of the Union is a time to recognize the progress we’ve made in recent years: Investments in our roads, bridges, and other infrastructure. Hundreds of thousands of jobs added and unemployment at a record 50-year low. Thousands of manufacturing jobs coming to Ohio. Lower prescription drug and energy costs. The SOTU is also an opportunity to look ahead at the work that we still have ahead of us: Reducing gun violence in our communities. Protecting essential programs for working Americans like Social Security and Medicare. Strengthening workers’ rights to join a union and bargain for better wages, benefits, and conditions. | | Thank you, Team Sherrod | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The last remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
Ohio is already shaping up to be a must-win battleground.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58325423/390710227/1447767374?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.05_b1_sb_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2RiZTRmNS05Y2E1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vK8lcu7W8J9Us-1UJl3HsRXZbVnXOPSQ6ucUyL4VG_o=)
---
I’m up for re-election in 2024, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. (_There’s already a wealthy Republican state senator considering running against me_.)

NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than last year’s Senate race in Ohio – and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.

[**Frankly, it’s going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Greg Landsman’s as we begin the new year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58325424/390710228/1447767374?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.05_b1_sb_all&amount=26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2RiZTRmNS05Y2E1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vK8lcu7W8J9Us-1UJl3HsRXZbVnXOPSQ6ucUyL4VG_o=)

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.

I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do.

Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.

That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do – whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips – your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you.

[**I need you in this fight, too. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider chipping in our average online contribution of $26 – or whatever amount makes the most sense for you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58325425/390710229/1447767374?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.05_b1_sb_all&amount=26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2RiZTRmNS05Y2E1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vK8lcu7W8J9Us-1UJl3HsRXZbVnXOPSQ6ucUyL4VG_o=)

With gratitude,

Sherrod
| | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Box 413, Cincinnati, OH 45201
www.landsmanforcongress.com

body:

| | Dear Friend, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---

body:

Hello Patriot, This past week was a BIG week for the Ryan Chamberlin Campaign. First, we went LIVE on Newsmax, then were endorsed by Benny Johnson and Conservative Watch, USA, We had a great showing at the Marion County Tea Party forum, and our team canvassed homes everyday. Momentum is building!!! Check out a few of the highlights below, and be sure to follow us on [www.FB.com/RyanChamberlinCampaign](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=j7P1WDtJvQve0iI&b=_ss8qbTERJXC5mV1S4Rf2Q) Did you see Ryan on NEWSMAX? If you care about our great state of Florida and the upcoming Special Election, than you'll want to see this video.
[**_VIEW NOW: LIVE with Benny on his Newsmax program. _**](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=j7P1WDtJvQve0iI&b=SfesN3x9_A4ZsCaGg9hG6A "https://ryanchamberlin.acemlnc.com/lt.php?notrack=1&s=a03add20307b0c1272f90a6c5737b506&i=3A5A1A23")
---
[__](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=j7P1WDtJvQve0iI&b=SfesN3x9_A4ZsCaGg9hG6A "https://ryanchamberlin.acemlnc.com/lt.php?notrack=1&s=a03add20307b0c1272f90a6c5737b506&i=3A5A1A23")
Benny Johnson is a conservative creator and social media sensation. He’s known for his political wit and humor, and hosts a show on Newsmax called The Benny Report.

We went deep in discussing the state of Florida politics and this very Special Election here in Marion County
|
---
Ryan Chamberlin came under attack by a group of liberal insiders. _Their line of attack was simple: Ryan Chamberlin is too conservative_. They worry that Ryan won’t be able to get along with leadership in the House and Senate and that he won’t be able to get any deals done in Tallahassee.

****That is exactly why real Conservatives like Benny Johnson and Freedom Caucus member former Congressman Ted Yoho endorsed Ryan Chamberlin!****

********

Because the only mission that WE THE PEOPLE know that Ryan Chamberlin will accomplish are to:Stop the Backroom DealsHelp Secure the BorderKeep our Classrooms Free of Woke Ideology

_Ryan Chamberlin is the only candidate who can be trusted to stand with Gov. DeSantis_ , and that is why conservatives everywhere are coming to his support.

subject: Congrats Rep. Hakeem Jeffries!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
From: dpwillis67@gmail.com
| **BREAKING: Hakeem Jeffries makes history as the first Black lawmaker to lead a party in Congress** Listen, this is a HUGE milestone for Jeffries, Democrats, and the entire country. So we’re sending Jeffries a letter from our top grassroots supporters to congratulate him! [**We’re hand-delivering this letter to his office at 8 AM Monday – so we only have 55 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39787?t=6&akid=6276%2E878179%2EjixAJh) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39787?t=7&akid=6276%2E878179%2EjixAJh) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39787?t=8&akid=6276%2E878179%2EjixAJh)
---
TO: Representative Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – CONGRATULATIONS!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the pride and joy we had when we found out that you had been selected to lead the House Democrats!**

While House Republicans are in complete shambles and struggling to govern, you have Democrats ready to begin delivering on their promises to voters.

**We know fighting against MAGA extremists in the new GOP controlled House won’t be easy, but you’re already showing impressive poise and leadership.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding accomplishment and to continue to elect incredible Democrats like you »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39787?t=9&akid=6276%2E878179%2EjixAJh) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39787?t=10&akid=6276%2E878179%2EjixAJh) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39787?t=11&akid=6276%2E878179%2EjixAJh)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6276%2E878179%2EjixAJh). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6276%2E878179%2EjixAJh).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6276%2E878179%2EjixAJh) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=6276%2E878179%2EjixAJh). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6276%2E878179%2EjixAJh)

While House Republicans are in complete shambles and struggling to govern, you have Democrats ready to begin delivering on their promises to voters. We know fighting against MAGA extremists in the new GOP controlled House won’t be easy, but you’re already showing impressive poise and leadership. So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations! | X A grateful Democrat | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. If you’re not sure what’s happening with the debt ceiling, it’s as simple as this, folks: House Republicans are effectively refusing to pay the bills that Congress already owes — and want to make the American people foot the bill instead. Defaulting on our debts could topple the economy, yet the House GOP says they won’t raise the debt ceiling without making steep spending cuts. So what’s on the chopping block? Cuts to critical services like Social Security and Medicare that millions of folks in New Mexico and around the country rely on every day. [**Can you add your name to our petition to demand that House Republicans protect our economy and leave the benefits people count on alone?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58326524/390714105/-2125164533?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGRkMzAxOC1hYmE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lJ5q4Pf9i2E3yUnWy3gO-Eaomac214gCBLh8K0bLePM=&emci=830f1012-aba5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=74dd3018-aba5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58326525/390714106/-2125164533?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGRkMzAxOC1hYmE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lJ5q4Pf9i2E3yUnWy3gO-Eaomac214gCBLh8K0bLePM=&emci=830f1012-aba5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=74dd3018-aba5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

We can’t afford for Republicans to default on our country’s debt and tank the economy. Democrats like Martin have worked hard to lower everyday costs and create jobs for workers and families.
**In fact, the unemployment rate just fell to a level we haven’t seen since the moon landing. 1**
But defaulting on our debts would undo months of job growth, make everyday prices higher, and cause the national debt to skyrocket.2 And cutting programs like Medicare and Social Security would be detrimental to millions of people whose livelihoods depend on them.
[**Please, add your name to call on House Republicans to put workers and families first — not their own political agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58326526/390714107/-2125164533?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGRkMzAxOC1hYmE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lJ5q4Pf9i2E3yUnWy3gO-Eaomac214gCBLh8K0bLePM=&emci=830f1012-aba5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=74dd3018-aba5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

Defaulting on our debts could topple the economy, yet the House GOP says they won’t raise the debt ceiling without making steep spending cuts. So what’s on the chopping block? Cuts to critical services like Social Security and Medicare that millions of folks in New Mexico and around the country rely on every day. | We can’t afford for Republicans to default on our country’s debt and tank the economy. Democrats like Martin have worked hard to lower everyday costs and create jobs for workers and families. In fact, the unemployment rate just fell to a level we haven’t seen since the moon landing. 1 But defaulting on our debts would undo months of job growth, make everyday prices higher, and cause the national debt to skyrocket.2 And cutting programs like Medicare and Social Security would be detrimental to millions of people whose livelihoods depend on them. Thank you, Team Heinrich * 1 2 | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States

subject: When Republicans say they want to privatize the VA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Last year, Veterans Affairs helped to find permanent housing for more than 40,000 veterans.
#
Derek -
Last year, the Department of Veterans Affairs helped to find permanent housing for **more than 40,000 Veterans.**
These are people who signed up and served our country who were once without homes but today have a roof over their head and a pillow on their bed.
So when Republicans say they want to privatize the VA...
When Republicans threaten VA funding as part of budget negotiations...
This is what they are putting at risk.
And that is why VoteVets will fight them to the end.
